Full_Review: The breakfast was insanely expensive I thought it was included when I booked and the windows don t keep any of the sound from the streets out My window faced an Irish pub so it was pretty noisy most of the night   The room was beautiful and the bed was very comfy

reception staff is quite nice but a little bit overloaded with work one of them was so busy that he took the decision just to be rude and to ignore clients not a good point for such a great hotel  the location is great the interior design is contemporary and upscale

Lifts were still old  I ve stayed in this hotel a few times from grand hotel 20 years ago it was a bit tired a few years back The modern refurbishment has worked wonders and with its ideal location across from central station the hotel is now one of the better 5 in the city for the money I d recommend a second look if you ve stayed before

We booked the hotel for our 20th Wedding anniversary hoping for a quiet weekend away We were woken on the first morning by a wakeup call that wasn t booked and every other morning by room service The room was in the basement along a dark corridor and was directly opposite a noisy bar   The hotel was in walking distance of the centre

Because my room was next to the door to garden and to the next building hotel staff walked by all the time making noises from shutting the doors It will be nice if the staff traffic could be reduced   Room was comfortable and came with french press good coffee and tea Colour pencils were useful to mark the map The room gave such welcoming feeling that I felt at home

On booking com the room included the VAT Tax of 6 and the City Sales tax of 5 They added another 5 City Tax on to the total price Then when they put the total amount on my credit card they charged me an extra 100 on top of that Unbelievably very shady Booking needs to do a better job monitoring the hotels

Found the check in chaotic and rather uncaring it was so odd to be given a map of the property by the front desk instead of being escorted to the room I only say this as the hotel is made up of many different old homes and is a bit of a labyrinth to the jet lagged and newly arrived They are so busy I can t help but think the customer service is under pressure With so many other fine hotels in the area I do hope they work on this as in the rest of the hotel we had excellent service   The room was very clean with lots of natural light from the large windows super shower and toiletries The hotel has a lovely internal garden with excellent service and afternoon sun Location is perfect for the 9 streets Jordan area

The bed was extremely comfortable and the room had a lovely view of the Canal the first room we had offered was on the top floor and covered two floors it was really nice and quirky but we asked if it was possible to have a room all on one level and that was sorted out within 10 minutes of the request the staff could not have been more helpful

Nothing we didn t like or would wish to change  Our room was huge and had a beautiful bathroom with LeLabo products The hotel has an unusual quirky layout due to it consisting of a whole block of typical Amsterdam canal buildings this made for an interesting stay though we did get lost a few times Very friendly staff great breakfasts what more could you want We managed to walk everywhere too as the location is very central A lovely location to be based

The service is fine but not great for a 5 star hotel The hotel is made of several townhouses that were merged into this quaint yet fancy hotel Some rooms are located in between floors which means you may have to go up and down some stairs to reach yours Considering this in a 5 star accomodation I would expect to have a bellman to carry my heavy luggage and not have to do it myself The bathroom is not equiped with a bath only a shower The breakfast was a disappointment to us and so was the bar   The rooms are nicely appointed clean and super charming The room and bathroom are really large for a town hotel and well lit which is great for makeup The delicious tea and coffee as well as some Dutch cookies are a pleasant surprise All the necessities are provided umbrella water maps etc The hotel is located in a nice neighboorhood
Early check failed and no backup room for change The twin beds room is too small bed is narrow to sleep well   The location is excellent The hotel design is fantastic with beautiful garden restaurant

Breakfast much too expensive Free city maps MUCH Too small scale no good at all this should be remedied immediately Reception staff a little slow  Ambiance and decoration Bar was very comfortable and friendly Food was good quality but expensive Bathroom small but well designed Bed very comfortable

The breakfast menu could have maybe been rotated a bit Other than that no quibbles   We had a lovely view from our room of the pretty canal The hotel had beautiful gardens with hanging swings and outdoor seating areas Breakfast was great Croissants were particularly good had a nice crunch when you bit into it We were given a complimentary bottle of champagne as well for our week long stay which was an unexpected lovely touch Also loved the little touches stroopwafels bottled water everyday A candy platter in the lobby Very kid friendly too

I was expecting a charming boutique hotel until I found out that they have 200 rooms I was surprised It s till charming but less personal than expected For the rates they apply I think the standard room classic room are rather on the small side especially the bathrooms   I appreciated the interior design in this mansion It s very nicely and stylish decorated I would recommend the bar Excellent location if you want to be in the middle of the city center

There is absolutely nothing that I didn t like about this hotel The only thing I don t like is that i can t go back more often as I live in Florida and that was a long flight I didn t like that I couldn t afford one of the amazing suites   This hotel is unbelievable They took the charm and warmth of 25 17th 18th century homes and seamlessly connected them Then they modernized them perfectly and added in all the luxuries of a 5 star hotel As I explored this stunning hotel I discovered beautiful little nooks and crannies around every corner I highly recommend a visit to the Pulitzer Bar It has a chic speakeasy vibe and is perfect for a hand crafted cocktail I really liked the Paloma cocktail and went back for it several times during my stay The cafe and restaurant are also fantastic The location is also wonderful as everything is so convenient to walk to and also gives you the authentic Amsterdam feeling The outdoor space at the hotel is really enjoyable as well I seriously loved every single thing about this hotel and would love to stay there again

We were there for 6 nights there was no place in the bathroom to put your personal toiletries and is small for 2 people Also very little drawer space so we had to live out of our luggage for the 6 days No shelves or space to store your clothes but the room is pretty   The location is excellent the service is outstanding the decor is beautiful

Our stay was fantastic The garden and glass hallways are so beautiful and romantic but I was especially impressed by how attentive the staff was We asked for more complimentary cookies because they were soo good and the concierge brought us like four packs
Gorgeous rooms thoughtfully and tastefully appointed Spacious and elegant The staff was incredibly professional and restaurant and bar were phenomenal
rooms are not very sound proof you can hear the neighbors some times   location was great hotel had great character and very friendly staff nice rooms good value for money

Awesome hotel filled with character right on the canal and close to the centre of Amsterdam Great neighbourhood with lots of quirky little shops and restaurants nearby

Room was too hot and temperature controls appeared to make no difference   Excellent location with very friendly helpful staff Room and hotel was what you would expect for the price

heating ventilation it the rooms was a little noisy  the hotel is refined very chic very well decorated a warm atmosphere at the lobby Location is excellent beautiful neighborhood would recommend the tour by the hotels beautiful boat the personnel was attentive great experience

Everything about this hotel made me smile The interiors the incredibly comfortable bed the absolutely superb breakfast delicious cocktails in the bar and super friendly and helpful staff to name but a few I will most definitely be back soon

The rooms are on the small side and housekeeping wasnt very good room wasnt vacumed and i found black hairs  The staff is what makes this hotel great And location The breakfast is amazing And take the boat trip from hotel it was really great

Problems with key On each day key wouldn t work in room Waited 40 mins of get in on Sunday Had to change plans as a result   Location character

It was very noisy We had a room tucked away out the back so were protected from the noise of the teams but sound within the hotel really travelled eg from the bathroom next door guests moving around in the lobby etc   Staff were very friendly and helpful Room was immaculately clean and location excellent for accessing all key sites

There is a need for a proper lobby area where customers can relax and chill and meet up with friends   The hotel is in a really good location close to many restaurants and shops It also has good accessibility to public transport and walking distance to many popular places in Amsterdam The staff are very friendly and helpful If we are to visit Amsterdam again this hotel will be our first choice
The location was perfect Tram stop nearby with trams direct to Centraal Station and within walking distance of everything too Very clean and comfortable rooms Lovely hotel

The windows in our room were sealed shut so we were unable to get fresh air the room was too hot and stuffy for good sleeping   The hotel is in an excellent location for easily moving around Amsterdam near tram and hundreds of restaurants The staff is super friendly and helpful The room size was good great sunlight

Great location staff were really helpful and friendly at all times Room was clean comfortable and quiet Tea and coffee making facilities in the room which is essential for us Great value for money and will stay here again when we next visit Amsterdam

The way when I booked hotel it said it was 290 and when I got there it came too 303 they already took 140 off me before I got there and took 303 off me as I left so I basically spent 443 on room wasn t a where of price  The room over looked the lake and was a very good view are room had TV as well which was nice for been out all day

Only thing that we found a slight problem bed was in an alcove and there was no room for bedside cabinets which we kind of missed having Did not eat at hotel at all so cannot comment   Very good location Enjoyed our stay at the hotel was very clean and had what we needed We do not spend much time in our hotel as when we go away we are there to see the sites Overall very nice

Spacious clean comfortable room with a very comfortable bed Good views of an amazing city Everything we needed in a great location close to tram stop but also walking distance to all the attractions and a great way to explore the city
The carpet and the curtains in the hotel are really old with obvious stains   The location of the hotel is great the room was clean the breakfast excellent and the staff very friendly and efficient

We simply loved everything about this Hotel  The location perfect Easy to reach by bus to and from Schiphol airport The extremely friendly staff We were there at 9h30 the morning and our room was ready The huge room and bathroom

I didnt like that a card pre authorisation may be taken although this was pay nothing till you get there with free cancelation 3 weeks before I arrived they took 1 nights payment 158 without warning When I challenged this I was told they had not taken it in a couldnt care less attitude it was just put on hold and if I wasnt happy I could cancel and the money would be realeased back to me in 7 10 days I had booked well in advance and could not risk cancelling in case another hotel did they same thing before I got my money back They told me they would release the funds back into my account the day I arrived if I didnt cancel 2 weeks later the money appeared in my account The superior room was a waste of time space and money Although there were 2 chairs with a table there was a large space unoccupied that was useless I would reccomend you go for the comfortable double and to watch out for money taken out your account without warning The Gym was what I would describe as a single room   The hotel was central with nice breakfast and 24 hour consierge Bed comfortable although the superior room had twin beds together that didnt stay together causing a gap Nice toiletries including conditioner that were replaced once used

The noise outside hotel was not acceptable There was rioting by locals on the Friday night in the street and Police were dispersing the trouble between midnight and 5 am   Room was really good and staff were very friendly Couldn t fault the facilities in the room and the bed was really comfortable

Great location friendly and helpful staff Excellent breakfast Staff noticed that it was my wife s birthday from the registration form and took the time to leave birthday greetings in the room together with a gift of some Dutch biscuits A greatly appreciated touch Thank you

The noise from the street below could be heard till early morning   Excellent location on the canal with restaurants shopping Riijks Museum all within a short walking distance The room was very spacious with an old world charm

Our first room a junior suite was very disappointing It was a dark room with a small view to the canal and more expensive than the second room we got which was amazing The hotel did not answer our email they ignored it We had a problem with our shuttle to the airport and it left a bad feeling   Our second room at the corner with big windows was great Breakfast was not very rich but everything was very good and fresh

At times the breakfast buffet was down very low before things were topped up I got the last slice of cheese and the muesli was almost empty However a few minutes later it was topped up   Location was excellent would definitely return Tram right outside the door

Helpful staff large comfortable and quiet room We d planned to go out for breakfast but the range and quality of breakfast at the hotel meant we never felt the need to look for breakfast elsewhere Tram stops outside
Great location canal view room was large very comfortable Staff were lovely so helpful Had brunch in their restaurant which also was very good

TAXI SERVICE FROM HOTEL We have never felt so pressurised to use someone s service with whom we never made any contract or agreement not even verbally as I did not place the phone call to the taxi company the receptionist did After asking for taxi at the reception I immediately requested to cancel it as it would take more time to get there than the uber and we had to rush to the airport The taxi ordered showed up at the same time as our Uber driver I was verbally attacked by the taxi driver who shouted WHO DID YOU ORDER FIRST THE UBER OR TAXI He was unfortunately happily backed up by manager or supervisor of the hotel who decided to get her claws out saying it was illegal and that I made HER ring a cab and so was Required to use his service for christ s sake please check EU consumer law and have a good read about the right of cancellation You should be ashamed of this havoc you created in your street you blocked your busy road for a good five minutes you shouted at a customer who spent 800 for 3 nights at your hotel and most importantly who had no time to waste being a victim of this appalling scene when in a hurry to get to the airport You are only accommodating when it is for your own interest That pathetic behaviour only appeared to us as utter disrespect to my partner myself and the Uber driver on our last day I do not recommend using the desk service as despite amsterdam being very liberal you may feel deprived of your basic customer rights  I wanna say first and foremost that I thoroughly enjoyed the presence and customer service offered by Camiel the more than helpful face of the hotel that helped us on our first and second day
A bit noisy as beside trams and party zone   Staff were exceptionally helpful as I required an emergency referral to a dentist Camiel from the front desk helped arrange it
For guests staying on top floor staff can be a bit more helpful proactive in helping to get luggage up very steep flight of stairs   amazing room great hotel restaurant accommodating staff
Wish we could have had a bath   Staff were really friendly and we felt that the staff treated as an individuals The restaraunt food was amazing and I would recommend the apple cake Yummy

A bit noisy not too much But you can hear the road from the rooms with all windows shut Not too much   location is excellent even though our room was not technically canal facing we could see it and we had a super tiny balcony which we thoroughly enjoyed The staff is absolutely amazing They made us feel very welcome and comfortable I highly recommend this place Amsterdam is all about location You need to be in the heart of things to get the most out of it

The location is great for shopping and sight seeing Tram stop 1 2 5 right outside If coming from schipol train and tram gets you to the hotel in under 30 minutes Staff very friendly Hotel is cosy and quirky great change from big hotel chains where everything looks the same Super comfy bed

We were surprised that there was no lounge to sit in somewhere to relax at the end of the day   The room was large with a lovely view of the canal It was clean The breakfast was good with a good buffet choice

Did not like the fact that as residents could not get a meal in the hotel on night of arrival apparently restaurant fully booked albeit this could be construed as a positive sign Also were unable to get a drink upon our return to hotel on Sunday night about 10 45pm as we were told till had been counted and closed when reminded that we were residents we still were not served basically bed time Restaurant serves as bar and vice versa so not ideal if restaurant busy Breakfasts were disorganised staff were not attentive food options were slow to be topped up if at all when running down generally lacking Conversations and noise from other rooms can be clearly heard from within own room which was strange and intrusive For what you get pretty expensive   The bed was comfortable and the room clean Location was good
Bathroom very small Bedroom quite small Shower very slow to drain electrical points didn t all work problems with phone charging very dusty on top of wardrobe suitcase storage

No complaints Maybe add to the breakfast choices e g rye bread   Quiet spacious clean room on 5th floor overlooking city rooftops and Prinsengracht for a premium Next to main tram routes Good breakfast Friendly helpful staff If you want a decent hotel room such as this one located in downtown Amsterdam you have to pay that bit extra
No negative comments at all   The breakfast selection was amazing The rooms were spacious and clean The staff were very friendly and accommodating It was excellent we will return

We thought the bar and dining facilities were a little dreary so we did not eat there Also this is in the heart of a big city so it is not always quiet   We asked for a nice double room with a canal view and paid 25 euros a night extra We did get a lovely room overlooking the canal and away from the busy street I did not see the other rooms for comparison but we thought it was worth it Also the staff was very friendly and helpful It s a great location we walked everywhere we wanted to go

The hotel is located on a corner where it faces both the canal and the return side faces just the street The rooms facing the canal have big windows that open which is great The rooms on the street side have all the windows sealed off on the inside with a layer of plexiglass only because the hotel was forced to due to the number of people who complained because of the noise Too bad My advice to those who complained would be Don t book a hotel in the heart of a big city if you are expecting silence When in a big city enjoy all it has to offer The hotel was very accomodating and moved us   The rooms that we had were very nice and the staff were excellent The breakfasts were very good We ate at the restaurant on our last night only but were wishing we had tried it earlier as the food was very good The soup Cream of Celery was excellent

At breakfast supply often could not keep up with demand I could not manage the series of steps in the corridors This should be mentioned in advertising Carpets could do with either replacement or a very good clean   The location was brilliant Staff were great Our room on the fourth floor was very quiet

The pillows were too soft Lack of free drinking water in rooms Staff could have been more hospitable Larger bathroom towels   The location The shower The room and the view The gym was adequate and offered free water

Mini bar was not cool Basin plug leaked Scrambled eggs were hard but it is difficult to keep them soft over a long breakfast serving   Breakfast generally and service Location but it would have helped if I had discovered there were 3 tram service to the door step before I arrived was it clear on the website The larger twin room was very good the basic double a bit cramped Shower worked well TV excellent Bed comfortable

it looks like an old american hotel of the 80 s with damaged dark carpet and wood furnitures extremely noisy I could hear my neighbours flushing At the breakfast I was asked to sign even before I was sitting on the table I even did a remark to the guy there the paroxysm is that I forgot my electric toothbrush there I called them to ask if they could send it back to me They were friendly on the phone and of course said yes Surprise when 2 days after I receive an email saying that they couldnt use my credit card to pay the mailing to my address crazy stingy poor service and furnitures nothing to recommend definitely not   nothing

Pillows where a bit to puffy for mine and my partners liking other than that it was a lovely hotel  The staff was very friendly and welcoming when we got there and throughout our stay And the fact that we was very close to shops and food places like mc donalds just round the corner Pandora my favourite shop and other shops to get every day bits if you ve run out or left it at home so very handy to have them just down the road

Way overpriced for what you get Over 800 for 3 nights in a room with mildew stiff bed and loud malfunctioning air conditioner Charge you for phone calls in which you can t even connect with the place you re trying to reach   Location was about the only pleasant aspect of this hotel

The Windows didn t open and so no fresh air Noisy air conditioning particularly noticeable at night   Spacious room with large windows overlooking busy street so plenty to see and ideal for people watching Despite trams going by there was very little noise to be heard in the room Central location with short walk to museums dam square and the shops
Rooms are dated Perhaps premium rooms are better but standard rooms are basic  Excellent staff Gave us a gift for my girlfriends birthday Very helpful and professional

We arrived late but having to walk up 3 sets of awkward spiral stairs was a bit annoying   Excellent restaurant that we ate in twice for lunch and dinner Comparative to the good restaurants in our city Vancouver Very comfortable beds much more than our boutique hotel in Barcelona

The hotel has policy rules which are not published at booking com neither written anywhere in the hotel premises or document They just claim that a verbal rule expressed by the staff post factun is enforceable The argument guest is not allowed because I say so now seems really strange I had to argue for 30 mins and I rented the best room the penthouse in the hotel Another inconvenience was the fact that you can t enter the hotel when the receptionist is out They simply lock the entrance and make you wait until the receptionist is back The reason they provide is security One would wonder what kind of incidents they might faced And if the hotel is not secure hire a security guard or implement a security system When the room costs 350 a night it seems a reasonable investment   Location the view from the penthouse

The bed was much too hard for our liking   The location was perfect Away from the congestion of the central area but perfectly situated for restaurants and shopping The front office sat were always smiling and incredibly helpful with any questions thrown at them the breakfast was a great addition something for everybody s taste in breakfast

The hotel had everything I was expecting and I wasn t disappointed about anything  location was perfect staff friendly bed was comfy you walked straight out the front door to the tram stop Had lots of delis and restaurants close by and was within 30 minute walking distance of all the attractions we wanted to visit

Only negative would be 15 euro for breakfast per person but it is average for most of amsterdam as breakfast not usually included in booking price   Fabulous location Tram right outside the hotel and cheap to get bus from airport to 2 minutes from hotel Beautifully decorated inside and out Lots of restaurants nearby next to beautiful houses and area Staff are so helpful Rooms are bigger than expected lots of walking space And cleaned every day Great additional extras like gym and ice machine Quiet inside hotel also The hotel made our stay even more incredible And great value for money I will definitely be staying here again if im ever in amsterdam and will be recommending it to all 10 out of 10

Breakfast selection could have been more varied suggest making robes available given the cost of the rooms suggest bottled water given cost of the rooms  Location is excellent easy access to tram helpful staff quiet rooms

Despite asking for a room on upper floor when booking they claimed that they did not have one After arguing with the manager a room was somehow found I felt that they try to cheat me The room needs a lot of upgrade Nearly fell because of p broken shower Frame   Location was perfect Breakfast was excellent

Windows are not double glazed Noisey all hours of the day and night due to foot and tram traffic   Location walking distance to many places of interest and on three tram lines My room was large airy and bow window bright with seating area and lamp for reading
Location was really convenient and right on the canal Half a block to the 1 2 5 tram line super easy to get around Close to museums and great shopping

Our adult daughter was the very top room I can t remember the room number above the restaurant and when we checked in we assumed it was near our room as the numbers were very close The check in staff member should have explained where the room was AND how to get there It was very confusing   The location the size cleanliness of our room and the staff were excellent

Run down hotel The room view was horrendous overlooking the back service entrance Thin walls could hear the neighbors and some construction going on early in the morning Did not like the fact that I had to leave my key at the reception I was told it is for security reasons and was provided a card with which to identify myself but was asked only once for it and the other times there were people at the reception I have not seen before that did not bother asking for it Security I think not   The maid service And the location
Nothing everything was great It was recommended by a friend and she was there about 10 years ago   We loved the location the people were wonderful and very helpful Good spot for a lovely vacation
Price was a little high   Walking distance to just about everywhere in Amsterdam Close to shopping restuarants Room was clean good size canal view We only stayed one night after a Viking cruise

could be a bit more generous with the teabags and a lounge would be nice to talk to other travellers  v comfortable room and good breakfast lovely views from canal side setting good situation beween main museums and canal system but quiet right next to a tram stop
Some of reception staff not all as some were good could do with a little help in customer relations Not rude but not particularly helpful   Location
Great place helpful stuff clean convenient room was VERY quiet despite tram right outside the window Would definitely recommend the place and would definitely stay there again

The location was very good hotel staff very friendly and helpfull and room always cleaned with fresh towels didn t eat in hotel so can t comment on food but food in Amsterdam was always good but found very expensive

The hotel was in a beautiful building next to a canal With a restaurant downstairs and tables outside facing the canal Our room was spotlessly clean with crisp white linen on the bed and it had four pillows

The room was a long distance from reception it can t be helped it s the layout of the hotel  Comfiest bed I have EVER slept in The staff were extremely helpful and friendly and always happy to help The room was nice a little more expensive than other options however it is worth the money compared to other places I have stayed in Amsterdam I would highly recommend this hotel great staff nice rooms and a redo illusory comfortable bed

One night was noisy from outside and because a couple from the netherlands spoke very loudly in their room on our floor between 1 and 2 am the second night was perfect   Location very convenient large and confortable room nice view over the canals
No negative comments at all   Very good service at the reception Friendly stuff Excellent location very convenient for sightseeing Nice view at the channels Breakfast was good

Carpet was extremely stained in bedroom No milk in room for tea coffee would not deliver to room was been charged for room service otherwise I could have left my room and walked to restaurant free of charge Staff not anyway helpful Was told when paying the bill about street tax which was 6 38 Euro per day again no mention of this when booking or when we checked in   Location was central enough to shopping and sites
The hotel is a bit dated needs new carpets Breakfast dining area is miniscule and quite frankly univiting   Excellent location Despite negative points would still go back
Very small windows no view Long walk to attractions Too expensive for what it was  Nice hotel very close to theatres lots of shopping close by very good access to restaurants Tram very close

The location was great for what we wanted which was to be close to the nightlife and amenities The party I travelled with all agreed that should we come to Amsterdam again we would definitely book the Dikker

The canal view room is very quiet The location was perfect within walking distance of the museums Vondel Park and Dam Square There are many great restaurants within two blocks of the hotel All of the staff were very friendly and helpful to us The air conditioning was a blessing on those rare warm days in Amsterdam

Hotel staff were quite unhelpful at times when we asked where things were Construction work woke us up early on one of the mornings which we were not made aware of before our stay Expensive   Excellent location right in the city centre surrounded by several eating places Only a 10 15 minute walk to major attractions such as Van Gogh museum and Anne Frank house Clean and comfortable room Restaurant staff very friendly

We paid almost 700 for 3 nights and it felt like it was a lot of money for what was a nice but not excellent hotel The bed linen had holes in it the sink had a crack there were some spider webs at the ceiling Nothing major but just little things that you notice once you pay a lot of money   The location is excellent the view was great

Street noise through the whole night on weekend but this also provided a fascinating insight into life for the young people in Amsterdam   Extremely helpful and friendly English speaking staff including the lady organising the excellent breakfasts Good central location Able to open a window to obtain fresh air and the view over canal

Overall it was excellent Staff was helpful professional and friendly Our room on the 5th floor 504 had a wonderful view from the balcony Room was clean and large Location was excellent and safe Would book again

The staff were really attentive and accomodating I arrived late and although restaurant at the hotel was already closing they made a salad for me and even gave a glass of wine on the house The location of this hotel is very convenient my room was very spacious
The street can get loud at night but the hotel did a good job sound proofing the rooms   Room was bright and clean Friendly staff Transit close by Convenient location for everything

Breakfast was ok but unimaginative and by Dutch standards basic no cured ham for example prosciutto style scrambled eggs looking faded   This hotel is a classic in the most charming part of town overlooking the Prinsengracht stylish understated large rooms high ceilings tradition updated

We loved our stay here Our room was clean comfortable and had great views of the canal We did not find it noisy at all contrary to other reviews Reception staff were very helpful and gave good travel tips Breakfast was good and location was excellent Most of the sites were walking distance and its right in the middle of the shopping district They were even sweet to semd a birthday note for my mother

Some rooms should be illegal to sleep in The noise of the street is terrible both day and night I checked in at 11 00 pm exhausted after a long flight and had to wait for another hour so that the staff will try and fix the key that didn t work After a long hour of waiting I was asked to go to the staff every time I wanted to enter the room because the key still doesn t work They fixed it only the next day The sheets and the carpet were torn and stained The sink was broken The whole floor was smelly Even though there is an elevator you still have to take too many stairs There were dead bugs on the curtains that probably have been dead for a while Flies and sorts of bugs in the room Staff weren t very nice and even a bit rude   Location is good

Unable to write anything we didn t like as the hotel surpassed our expectations  A great location handy for all museums etc and we liked the fast and efficient check in and check out The room was excellent with a spectacular view over Amsterdam The included breakfast was excellent with ample fresh food The staff were helpful and friendly

Nothing not to like and would recommend   Big room in a quiet part of hotel which was welcome after a hectic sightseeing day Staff were friendly and help full and location was excellent with plenty to do nearby

The hotel is around the corner from the tram that gives you access to anywhere you want to go in Amsterdam The area is near the museums and park for a great and relaxing walk in the sun Breakfast was a very nice start to our day and our family room mature couple and elderly father had plenty of room for us and all our luggage beds very comfortable Staff very helpful with local info and taxi arrangements
Waiting for small lifto which took a longtime   Big room with beds for 3 Great breakfast and nice staff on front counter Close to lots of eating places
Room was noisy with air conditioning just outside room We had paid for superior room would have preferred basic without noise  Location was excellent Staff were very friendly
It was quite noisy while the location is perfect it also happens to generate a lot of street and tram traffic at all hours and thus street noise   Our room was fabulous
The fitness room was small and very basic   The location was very convenient for the museums flower market restaurants and cafes and the tram stop The staff were very polite and helpful

Further away from Dam Square Chinatown etc A few steps at the front make it harder to carry suitcases you have to do it yourself   Location is close to restaurants shops canals Right outside is the tram stop so very convenient Feel safe in the area

Needs recarpeting old stained carpets make the hotel look rundown and dirty but it was really very clean   Central location 15 minute walk to museum square 20 minutes to Anne Frank House 1 tram ride to Red Light District Rooms were very sound proof and overlooked canal

Superior canal view had to be viewed while on balcony standing up not what was displayed on the Internet Fantastic location made up for the view Next time I will not pay up for a view and I would not hesitate to stay again Great place to stay   Staff was absolutely wonderful showing us on a map major attractions in walking distance Convenient bus stop right outside Clean room Computer and printer available for guests Dining on site with great staff again too

Room little old fashioned   Location excellent staff friendly and helpful Free Tea and coffee and hot choc machine in lounge Beds clean and comfortable pillows Tram stop directly outside hotel Safe square area Good shops on doorstep Would stay there again

Not a luxury hotel but old small relatively simple hotel   Old building with basic rooms Lived at the top overlooking the canal and city nice Quiet very good bed and great balcony Lovely breakfast very nice people in the reception and good cleaning

Noise was a bit of problem but then Amsterdam is a night city Recommend earplugs for weekend nights   Excellent location for sightseeing at museums but also close to the Leidsplein for dining outside room was large and stylish and great view over the city 403

There was nothing to dislike  The staff were very friendly A small treat was left in the room for my friends birthday Lovely breakfast with a big choice Comfortable beds Close to flower market lovely restaurants and shops

I found the bed hard and didn t sleep well Some of the rooms are accessed by small flights of stairs up down if you have reduced mobility ask for a room with level access   Inner facing room was extremely quiet despite central rather noisy location Air con worked well could be adjusted to suit your preference Staff were very friendly helpful Breakfast costs extra but it was very good with a wide selection

The breakfast although adequate was quite boring with not much choice   The hotel is in a very good location for walking and exploring around the locality with trams available just across the street for exploring further afield

I timed my vacation at the same time the wonderful Thijs restaurant was closed for remodeling Thank goodness plenty of other tasty dining opportunities are close by   Beautiful delicious breakfast choices from eggs to cereal to bakery varieties of hot and cold beverages All staff warm and welcoming Bed very comfortable Room was very quiet even tho it faced the canal our request Everything clean clean

The hotel is a bit tired and for the price I would have certainly expected a higher standard of comfort facilities I had a problem with finding anyone on reception when I wanted to check out in the morning which wasn t great   The location was great and the breakfast was decent
The room was cold there was no heating at WC the WC didn t have a sink the bathroom was seperate The stairs are too narrow and not convinient for carrying a large suitcase   The location was good
Quite expensive and have to pay extra for canal view and breakfast so could only stay one night   Amazing canal views Lovely building Comfortable room

Breakfast items ran low or ran out by 9 30am which I felt was not acceptable given the high cost of the breakfast   The view of Prinsengracht from our room was very special The Staff were all so helpful and friendly and the hotel comfortable and clean and brilliantly placed for exploring the city
Nothing really   Location couldn t be better Close to the museum quarter great restaurants within 10 minute stroll Staff very friendly and helpful Thoroughly recommend this hotel
No complaints  Helpful staff Luggage store and lounge for late departure very useful Close proximity to museums attractions trams bars and restaurants

we have stayed there during the weekend the noise that came from outside was loud and we weren t able to sleep   the location is great the size of the premium room is great the traditional design is very nice

Decor a little dated carpets could do with cleaning or replacing   Efficient and friendly staff willing to help with anything Asked fora quiet room which was exactly what we got Room with a view of canal

The nice location near to the tram has its downside with the noise occured by the traffic What can be improved is avoiding the noise made by the vacuum cleaner at 7am I would have appreciated to sleep a bit more this morning   The localisation is perfect in Amsterdam to walk around the nice things to visit It was as well very convenient to take the tram and go to the professional meetings I had The breakfast offers various products of good quality I really appreciated it
Great location Large rooms Friendly staff Good breakfast The area is very busy and noisy but we were on the 4th floor and heard no noise at all inside the room

It was a little difficult getting to the room with our large suitcases with the odd sort of spiral staircase and a few steps up after taking the elevator   Room was very spacious and bed was comfy concierge was very helpful in arranging a taxi to the airport Location is great right along the canal
Very noisy at night stag and hen groups I think   Central location we could walk to most attractions Nice position overlooking the canal Very comfortable bed and excellent shower

We recently stayed on a two night break the location of the hotel was excellent with a tram outside our door but saying that u could walk to all the attractions Staff was very friendly and helpful will definitely stay there again

Very noisy area We had a room on the top floor facing the canal but despite that it was very noisy from the street Avoid rooms on the lower floors and avoid any room facing Leidesstraat   Spacious and comfortable room We upgraded to a superior room with a view to the canal Many nice restaurants nearby

There was a water leak in the bathroom above us and we had to move room We were very tactfully moved to the Junior Suite room 308 which was lovely as it over looks the canal and it s a beautiful room but there are steps to go up to the room so with lots of luggage it might be a problem for some However if it wasn t for this there would be nothing to complain about   Great location with easy tram just outside the door extremely helpful and polite staff and very comfortable and spacious room Definitely recommend

This isn t a dislike but worth mentioning The inroom dining hours were from 5 30pm to 9 30pm It would be nice if it offered some food during other times However this was not a problem just something the hotel might want to know   Location was amazing tram at the door which takes you to everywhere you want There is a tourist activity booking centre across the road which helped us decide on what to do and where to go in Amsterdam The staff were very friendly courteous and attentive to our needs Although the in room dining menu didn t have a big variety of food it had enough tasty dishes to try There were many restaurants bars and cafes around the hotel which made it easily accessible It was a great pleasure to stay at this hotel as it has exceeded our expectations
Great team good location which close to some metro lines and coffee shops etc shops etc great breakfast that was really nice and help in the vacation I was enjoy
Decor was a little jaded We were not fortunate enough to get a canal view room   Superb location Room was nice large beds very comfortable Staff were very pleasant

More of a 3 stars hotel Plastic curtains and separate cold and hot taps in the bathroom Duvet cover with holes Weak lighting Very small wardrobe for such a big room Few options for breakfast   Location Big bed with a very good mattress not too soft and 2 good pillows for each guest Helpful staff Spacious room and bathroom category superior Free Wifi

First of all no one helped us with the luggage I had to go up and down twice to take them myself The Windows don t open House keeping is terrible I washed the used cups myself everyday to drink my tea The cups should be replaced after use Also the hotel has no sound isolation The hotel could use some upgrades   The location is great
Nothing we could fault   The bedroom was large and bright the bed very comfortable bathroom very clean and clean towels and flannels every day shampoo shower gel etc tea and coffee facilities

The room temperature could not be regulated and it was quite cold there Some water in the fitness room would be very much appreciated   Very charming hotel in the old building That was great that they had fitness room there The living room was very stylish and spacious as well

The lift was only till 2nd floor And we had to carry the luggage through the stairs   Although got the room on the top floor It was a very large room with 4 Windows which was fabulous The heating and ac in the room was great Very very clean and tidy room Look brand new Location is unbeatable

No room service restaurant is open only for dinner Not a huge issue as the hotel is in the middle of the city but as everywhere else in Europe it is hard to find a good restaurant opened any time of the day they usually open for dinner and some are even stay closed on weekends which is strange   Stayed on the top floor penthouse room on the roof Loved the view Staff is friendly and helpful Breakfast is small but I guess it is enough to start with a day Location of the hotel is the best almost center of everything and with tram just downstairs easy to go anywhere

Nothing   Brilliant location was only about 10 minutes from Museumplein 2 minutes from Leidseplein where the airport shuttle drops you and only about 15 minutes from the Anne Frank house etc The staff were friendly The room was very clean and comfortable

Bathroom could use updating Had to lean back to get under shower   Very nice location right on 5 tram Walking distance to museums and city centre Loads of nice restaurants and cafes nearby Windows are double double glazed so outside noise is minimal if you listen you can just hear the tram rumbling past but it won t keep you awake Rooms are very clean

The room was small but what the hell The room was expensive but Amsterdam is a wonderful place to visit and you have to pay the price   Great location Very pleasant staff especially the guys in the bar
Great building awesome view I had a 5 floor overlooking the canal central location friendly staff nice breakfast spacey extra comfy rooms with a balcony

The location was brilliant Been to Amsterdam many times and like to be in different areas I would return to this hotel the location is so convenient for everything shopping walking museums food etc Tram stops right outside Loved the odd shaped room good space and comfort Cold outside in early Feb but cozy inside

The heater didn t work in our room and it was freezing end of Jan The staff were helpful and gave us extra blankets though It was fine but overall it was quite expensive for quite a basic hotel   Great location and the room was absolutely adequate for what we needed

Great location very close to everything Lovely size rooms very comfortable beds and quiet at night although room faced the street Overall great hotel great price and great location Lovely helpful staff at frontdesk No complaints

The toilet needs to be checked to flush some toilet paper takes multiple attempts   Very nice corner room for a low price Wouldn t find that anywhere else in Amsterdam Room had a great canal view plus view of the shopping street Nice bathroom with large bath

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: My booking was for two Rooms with canal view but one of the rooms 208 is much smaller than the other room and hardly fits for 2 guests and canal was hardly seen from this room even though I ve to pay same price for both rooms More attention need to be paid to room cleaning to cover dust removal out of furniture and surfaces and to check if provided towels is free from spots before putting in rooms Solution need to be made to integrate the sink in private bathroom  Breakfast was amazing and is one of best two breakfasts I had in hotels abroad during this summer trip Hotel is walking distance from the museum area and shopping streets Neighborhood is quite and safe for families Staff are friendly and cooperative

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The only thing I ve noticed through my two stays that when I get the rooms there s always a weird smell in it like a little bit of sewage But after putting perfume it s all good I love this hotel  Everything

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: I loved everything The only thing I didnt care for was at check out I asked to call a specific cab company as they said a return trip would be 25 vs 45 Euro The staff member who was very nice said she could call another one and they ll all be he same price Well it wasn t It was 45 Euro So that was annoying but I am not going to downgrade the wonderful experience we had over 20 Euro   The hotel has a beautiful modern design and is centrally located which allows you the ability to truly just roam during your stay The staff were very accommodating and extremely nice Breakfast was very good and it is a short taxi or train ride to the hotel from the airport

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing specific   Hotel and rooms design The staff were so helpful and friendly The hotel is nicely located and in a walking distance from many of the attractions restaurants shops etc The breakfast selection and choices were also nice

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Abusive videos running on the corridor televisions The menu at the hotel restaurant could have a wider choice   Wonderful quiet location that s still perfectly situated Loved the overall feel of the hotel and the look of it

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The bathroom is weird   Location is great in the heart of all activities in Amsterdam Hotel service is flawless The room is weird with the bathroom exposed to the bedroom so if you are traveling with anyone other than your wife significant other then privacy is an issue Overall a beautiful experience

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Comparing to our first stay it seemed the staff was overwhelmed with corporate meetings and large tour groups that distracted from blue chip service Example it took four requests to get a coffee refilled at breakfast It took two requests to get a newspaper delivered I don t remember either of these simple requests being an issue when we stayed there last year   Front desk personnel were exceedingly helpful Hotel is beautiful in a quirky way and perfectly situated for all the things we wanted to do we walked everywhere It was our second visit we were so taken with the place last year Especially liked the assortment at breakfast and after dinner desserts in the bar We stayed in the new back building this year our room was more spacious and better laid out than what I recall

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Staff during check in were a little indifferent There was no one to help us bring the luggage into the hotel or to put it in the taxi Check in was a bit chaotic Some staff members were great though   Great design very comfortable and spacious rooms Fantastic location

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The shower had a little bit moldy smell we had to open the window Other than that all was Perfect   Everything Hotel is hip and beautiful Location is the best Room and bed very comfortable Breakfast is really good Staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Not much negative at all It took a bit to get used to having the vanity and shower right open near the bedroom It wasn t an issue for us but I guess could be for others   The staff was very helpful and attentive whenever we would stop to ask questions in the lobby they would offer information water bottles and coffee The location is outstanding and our view of the canal made our visit that much more special Very easy to walk to many locations including the museums The food is wonderful and the included breakfast was generous We really loved our visit and would absolutely come back

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing really one of the best hotels I have ever been in I am a travel agent so I have been in many   Everything except the price of the alcohol in the minibar Hotel Staff and accommodation could not be any better Also the location was the best Centrally located and on a peaceful and quiet street Great place to stay Very comfortable room with a great bed and super nice shire

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Sink was inside the room Shower was see through Mirror wasn t above the sink instead to the side  My husband and I recently spent a few nights here on our first ever trip to Amsterdam Suffice it to say the Andaz is a gorgeous hotel From the location to the staff to the room everything was near perfection Front desk was throughly polite and helpful Concierge even took the time out to suggest where to go and what to see With the city s obsession with cycling we were pleasantly surprised to learn of the hotel s free bike rentals Room itself was nice if not a tad quirky Will admit however that the bathroom situation was a bit awkward however as the sink was located inside the room While that was strange the only real downside was that the mirror wasn t above the sink a particular inconvenience for men who need to shave instead positioned to the side Otherwise the room was extremely comfortable Mini bar was well equipped with complimentary water and juices Library downstairs near the lobby was also stocked with complimentary water juices and snacks for guests could help themselves All in all the Andaz is definitely recommended especially for those visiting Amsterdam for the first time

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing everything was great   The whole hotel is modern and funky with quirky touches everywhere you looked The staff were very attentive and exceptionally helpful for check in and all the recommendations and bookings we made The beds were comfortable mini bar complimentary and tea coffee water and snacks were available in the lobby lounge A lovely hotel that couldn t be faulted We really enjoyed our stay here

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The music They have a contemporary heavy beat digital music that blares throughout the entire hotel including the restaurant and the quiet library After a day or two it really starts to get to you There is no place in the common areas to get away from this horrible music After a day of sightseeing one just wants to relax and have a drink but it was impossible with this music When I complained about it I was told that it was Friday after all and everyone was in a party mood   The location is great One can walk to any place in the city Food was good property clean and staff friendly

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Have nothing negative to say   Beautiful property modern and chic with a staff that went out of their way for us The location was spectacular The canal view room was beautiful Loved our stay

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The reception staff are expected to do a lot reception concierge and sorting everything out in between The reception did not seem to have enough staff This meant long waits the staff handled it exceptionally well but it was frustrating at times our check in took 15 minutes We personally did not like the concept of the bathroom in the bedroom but that is a personal choice The pillows were uncomfortable as so flat   The staff were excellent and could not do enough to assist us The location and meals both evening and breakfast were delicious with a really excellent choice Free tea and coffee in the lounge is an excellent touch

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: It took Room service 2 days to fulfill request to pull alcohol from minibar They were supposed to replace it all with water and soft drinks but never did I did that myself  Staff was exceptional from the moment we arrived to checkout Perfect location

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The staff was super friendly and accommodating They offer an amazing bike tour around the city on Sunday mornings and complimentary wine tasting every evening The hotel was clean and gorgeous very well kept The location was perfect We were able to walk to every destination that we wanted to see while we were in Amsterdam Absolutely loved our stay

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: I am not fond of the shower being out in the room it s a lovely shower large and with excellent features so my only comment is simply that I prefer the shower and the basin closed I like the water closet separate but all in the same room Just a personal preference One thing that could be done I like the option of pulling the curtain but would have made better use had it wrapped around the shower area with the counter basin oriented parallel to the shower instead giving more space to move around the bed as well But again it was a nice sized room and still very comfortable   The decor the bedding and mattress pillows everything was very comfortable and pleasant The staff was excellent and accommodating I like the offer of beverages at check in and the minibar as complimentary I liked the history of the building and the installation of art work throughout the property

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The room was a little small but they utilized the space so efficiently  Loved the location Walking distance to all the important sites Staff was incredible It was kings day and no way to drive up to hotel we used hotel car service 100 from airport and 2 men from hotel met us and dragged our bags the 10 minutes through the streets and canals toget to hotel Hotel was such a find we walked to ann frank house and museums with no problem

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: I personally would have preferred more privacy for the toilets although the design is great  The rooms were very spacious and beautifully designed The location was great Close to everything and at the same time away from the busy areas The garden is beautiful and the hotel overlooks the canal which is charming

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing is not perfect at all even the new staff are excellent  This hotel have One of the best service in the world Fast in everything Helpful Modern room fully equipped Best location 6 stars not 5 comparing to any 5 stars hotel in Amsterdam Good welcome in check in

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The breakfast was very hard to understand They call it a buffet but you had to order hot food from the menu as well as go up and get some hot food so one morning I went up to get my eggs and then ask for bacon at the kitchen but by the time the bacon came my food was either cold or eaten On check in the receptionist said our room was her favorite room however the floor plans in the bedrooms show that every room was the same so seemed very rehearsed   Everything about the hotel was great the bars and decor

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Canteen basic atmosphere of the restaurant the food is good and deserves at least tablecloths on the tables   Nice bar area with some good dishes to eat

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: We spent 3 days in Andaz hotel and from the arrival till departure everything was wonderful A wonderful lady name jane greets us with a lot more than professionalism The breakfast was simply great a real lunch thanks to all of you guys

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The room doesn t offer the level of confort you are waiting for a 5 star Hotel The option taken to have the sink in the middle of the room is a nonsense This prevents intimacy privacy and tranquillity Of course it gives the feeling to have a larger room and it s quite orignal but not convenient at all and questionable from a aesthetic point of view Morevover rooms are quite small when considering the option taken of an invasive bathroom   The staff is very professionnali and efficient The bar and library with free wine between 5pm and 7pm offres a nice and confortable oppotunity to rest after visiting the city

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Shower looked good but leaked water Not a fan of the room bathroom facilities being open plan But it was very stylish aesthetically pleasing Not a major problem and would not deter us from returning  The hotel is very stylish and usually when places look that cool they feel all style no comfort The andaz benefits from wonderful welcoming staff and we were very impressed at the professionalism whilst still being informal welcoming Excellent location Excellent facilities Excellent personal service and not a faceless corporate feel Loved it

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Confused whether the hotel is trying to be a chic trendy hotel or whether it is trying to be a fancy B B I am a fan of Hyatt hotels and would stay at a Hyatt hotel almost wherever I go However I have to say I had a much better experience at the nearby Dylan than Andaz When we arrived there was inadequate number of staff at the front We were checked in given our room keys and off we went We explored the room ourselves not that It was that difficult The room size is small and we did not have the most basic standard room At Dylan I am not in any loyalty program and I was upgraded to a junior suite during my stay there a few months back And at Andaz I am a platinum level member of the Hyatt loyalty program no special treatment at all I had my stay 5nights stay in 2 reservations and by mistake I booked the second half in a lower room type I was asked to pay to stay in the same room otherwise I have to move to the lower room type So much for being part of a loyalty program Certainly feel so special Room walls are quite thin You can hear when your neighbouring rooms are being serviced or when there is a big party taking place at a function room all the way on the ground floor   The hotel is well located The international staff there are quite friendly and well trained Compliments to The Asian staff and the Aussie staff at the front As for local staff they are courteous some are quite friendly and some are still very dutch style Do like the free daily refill of non alcoholic drinks and snacks

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Really didn t like the room This is not open plan living it s a small room with a toilet in a cupboard Very disappointing and not good value for money On our return on the first day at 4 30 the room still hadn t been cleaned If the staff hadn t been so pleasant I would not recommend this hotel It s getting more and more difficult to find a good quality hotel   The staff were helpful charming and professional They represent the hotel very well

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: All pillows are flat as pancakes you press your hand on them and it feels like there s only a bedsheet beneath you The room design with hand basin embedded into a table is trying too hard to be cool The rooms are small don t trust the booking com pictures for them Why can t hotels rooms have 15 20 pictures for a room vs the 4 or 5 shown Why not a photosphere This isn t the only hotel where my expectations fell flat Then onto the food I expect a decent spread for breakfast which unfortunately wasn t there it s a make to order kitchen which can slow things down on busy weekends The staff were friendly but check in was slow Again in this day and age where I can buy a 3100EUR MacBook Pro in 5 minutes why does it take 10 minutes to get into a hotel room Perhaps this place was just too cool for me   Location friendliness of staff

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The bathroom arrangement in the rooms was a little surprising   The staff here are SO friendly Nothing was too much trouble for them My boyfriend and I ran the marathon on the Sunday and they were so accommodating with allowing us full use of the spa to shower afterwards The beds are so comfy The service at breakfast was lovely and the breakfast buffet was exceptional

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The vibe of the hotel was very modern but not very relaxing   Location was fabulous an easy walk to the museums restaurants etc the decor was um edgy Staff was excellent

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: The restaurant service was ridiculously slow and the waiters were simply inattentive and had to ask them for the same thing 2 3 times in a row It took me over 20 minutes to get a piece of toast with my meal I ordered a la carte Also I had to ask for my bill at least 3 times I felt like I spent an eternity waiting for everything I also booked a massage in the spa which was really terrible to be honest My friend who also booked a massage said hers was ok but not worth the price Just to give you an idea of how my massage went I arrived and basically was led by a man which I was totally not expecting to do my massage Then I reluctantly still stripped off and was under a very thin white sheet and the first thing this guy says is are you flexible and do you have your period I said no why extremely uncomfortable at this point and he said it had something to do with doing a massage that incorporates stretching Anyway the massage was just not good and completely improvised not at all what I m used to Incredibly disappointed about that I spent my time wishing the massage would end sooner rather than later Also later I asked my friend and she did not get asked the same thing or experience anything at all like my massage   Beautiful big rooms with contemporary design Comfortable beds and complementary hot and cold drinks in room were lovely The bar was also very nice with approachable staff that served unique cocktails The location of the hotel was very close to nice restaurants and bars and not far from transportation

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Parking expensive   Vanessa made us feel very welcome We were given complimentary Vodka cocktails on arrival as it was Vodka Friday then shown to our stunning garden view room The styling throughout the hotel is is fun smart and funky Take the time to watch some of the video art a number by a favourite artist Pipilotti Rist We ate a delicious meal in the Bluespoon on the first night The bar and restaurant both have a relaxed atmosphere with very attentive staff Non alholic drinks and snacks are complimentary from the mini bar Complimentary Wine Time is from 5 7pm in the library Good selection of arty books in there

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Would like to be able to turn he A C down slightly lower than 18 5C at night  This was an excellent hotel the design was probably the best we have seen it is perfectly placed for access to all the attractions We are picky travellers they definitely impressed us

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: Spa sauna needs cotton wraps not only towels   They provide Extra large umbrellas at the door They don t charge for a cup of coffee or tea when they offer at the bar

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel

Hotel_Name: Andaz Amsterdam Prinsengracht A Hyatt Hotel
Full_Review: We arrived at 12 pm at the hotel We had asked for an early check in but they couldn t provide it for us No problem we came back at 4 30 pm check in starts officially at 3 pm but still only 1 of 3 rooms was ready All the luggage had been taken to one of the other rooms which was awaiting final inspection from the manager for cleanliness and that s why we couldn t go to it and although we called reception 2 or 3 times asking for the luggage they kept delaying it We waited for 30 minutes for it In addition our friends who had the 3rd room were being sent from one room to another because nobody knew exactly which was their room So the reception staff is either inexperienced or overworked They smiled all the time though   Fantastic location couldn t have been better on one of the prettier canals in a quiet area Tram station 5 mins walk Most interesting locations within walking distance Overall very comfortable nice lounges great view from the room we had a canal view room Excellent breakfast though very expensive whether you went for the buffet or for the full breakfast 4 EUR for a boiled egg In the end I think the buffet is the best option

The room temperature couldn t be set above 23 C   Huge window huge bed free movies including XXX Goes with the transparent shower and translucent toilet Everything you need on a short trip Quality products cosmetics furnishing Quick self check in and check out And lovely messages everywhere And eco friendly The best way I saw for reducing unnecessary towel cleaning the 10 euro cupon

There could be a curtain between the shower and main door like there is between the shower and the bed when I was in the shower I was visible to people walking past when my husband opened the door The intimacy of having a toilet in the room is something that takes getting used to perhaps sound surrounding toilet for added privacy I missed having tea and coffee but understand why not available and was easy to have coffee downstairs in restaurant   I liked the quirky features such as the messages to guests the pictures and the artwork The staff were all helpful friendly and available throughout my stay Loved the ipad controlling the room Loved the really relevant and useful literature in the room which was invaluable in helping us find our way around Amsterdam and we took advantage of your restaurant recommendations thank you

The only thing I didn t like was the size of the rooms Very clean and modern and bed very comfortable Shower great too   Nice atmosphere in a very contemporary hotel Very relaxing and nice bar area downstairs The staff were very happy and very helpful

Finding the packaging of a used condom behind the bed from previous tenants of the room did not contribute too well to the impressions   This is a place you would remember as it is so different from everything else you tried It is very upbeat the room is fun with the transparent cylinders for shower and toilet plus the iPad smart room control Yes the room is small but it is cleverly designed so you will not bump into things all the time Breakfast is good public transport is really great

Small room don t bring more that one piece luggage Shower and WC in the sleeping room is questionable   Huge bed great wifi connection a lot of space in common areas at ground level Excellent for one night is you are travelling alone and you need a confortable room to sleep Bar open 24 7

If I was to nitpick the only thing I missed was being able to make a cup of tea in my room but that said the bar was a lovely area and I could easily buy a cup of delicious fresh ginger and lemon tea to take up The area is a little way out of the centre but once you ve got the hang of the tram system it s really not a problem at all and it is a nice peaceful neighbourhood   You have everything you need to a very luxuriant standard Really comfortable beds good perks like their eco warrior tokens where you gain 10 credit for not having your room made up every day the staff were super friendly and helpful The bar and lounge areas were very stylish and welcoming

Bed was so comfy And huge Overall the room was pretty great Controlling it with an iPad was quite nifty Toilet and shower being in the room didn t faze us at all There s a curtain that can be drawn across that area if you re a bit shy Staff were really friendly helpful too Loved the whole concept of the place Brilliant literature and art all around you 24hr bar Clever incentive to help the environment Couldn t really recommend the place more Tram stop was just outside 1 tram ride to city centre but takes almost half an hour I think that s the only slight negative I can think of Just fantastic Will definitely be back

Given voucher but voucher arrived after we had left for the day did not arrive back till early hours as had been away to football match but couldn t use voucher in morning   Kids enjoyed iPad control of lights and TV

location is slighty boring The toilets are not very private At some point our airco failed us a little   bed is big and really comfortable Staff is fantastic Breakfast was delicious Cable tv wifi and more facilities were outstanding we even stayed in a whole day Room is quiet Walking distance to the tram Great lobby with good bar and amazing they have computers printers and so much more to your service

The room is very small Not recommended more than one person to accommodate as there is no space to move at the same time There is no separate bathroom one cabinet for toilet and another one for shower There is no minibar no wardrobe no openable windows   Cozy and hi tech Staff is super nice Bikes and movies are for free Good for short stay for single travelers

The short story there was literally NOTHING that I did not like The long story Upon arrival in that dark and rather scary entrance I thought Oh my God where the bleeps did I get myself a room this time And then OK ZENNNNNN take a deep breath you ll survive I got a few more moments like that like when getting this flashy youngster guiding me to the computer to check myself in and when arriving in this endless red carpeted hallway with white walls and same colour doors every three meters reminding me of a super funky futuristic version of a psychiatric ward then upon entering my room with flying saucer like coloured lighting over the toilet and shower and this huge TV screen over the bed saying Welcome citizen Martine But every detail I was taken aback by turned out to be actually quite agreeable I even slept like a baby which doesn t happen in many hotels I can tell you that much Waking up with the trees hanging over my window helped And then the cosy every little corner looks different but it all feels like home ground floor where you can chose a different spot every day to have breakfast   They have the greatest cereal mixes including one for gluten free people AND they have soy milk when you ask for it They have REAL bread that you can slice yourself and REAL jam and berries All the simple good things and something for everyone s taste Surprising how a simple hotel like this can do that whereas the fancy hotels can barely get you a slice of totally tasteless gluten free bread let alone milk powder free and never mind a decent gluten free cereal mix or milk other than cow s Plus one asks for a ristretto the one shot italian one and one actually gets a real one for the other pluses see the section What you didn t like

The bath and shower in the middle of the bedroom floor is something to get used to Limited space to pack your toiletries   Staff were very friendly Breakfast is lovely but the same everyday Bed is very comfortable
No stamps to post my postcards   The staff excelled The ambiance was awesome and I loved being apart of this quirky little hotel I feel that I belong

The staff were very friendly and welcoming and there was just a very nice atmosphere in the hotel The rooms were very funky and different to any other hotel rooms we ve stayed in before

a place to put down my luggage  super friendly staff making you feel at home Lovely communication tone and great room and lounge interiors comfy bed

Small room size  Unique Hotel with friendly helpful always smiling staff Online check in within minutes Nice location 5 minutes walk from the Train station Tram stop just next to the Hotel Comfy beds Room has these mini Ipad that controls room lightings TV etc Good breakfast spread

Only a minor point although rooms have everything you need and very clean the toilet and shower physically in the middle of the room was a little off putting Its okay if you have a close relationship with someone you sharing but going the toilet behind a tinted glass cubicle or having a shower you can still see Room had everything you needed was clean just narrow and although air con very good I like to open a window   Hotel very clean staff helpful and ultra modern with everything you need room compact with digital facilities to open blinds change mood lighting air con bed very big and comfy You can get your tram tickets at hotel 17euro for 3 day pass Hotel in a good location just round the corner from Amsterdam Zeud main train station direct in 1 minutes from Airport Just round the corner is the tram stop for No 5 takes you through all the main tourist spots to Central Station no longer than 10 mins
