There were several things that we were unhappy with throughout the course of our stay 1 The staff gave us 2 single beds to sleep in we requested one double bed when we asked to move they allowed it to happen one day later but without even an apology for the inconvenience 2 The housekeeping staff walked into the room when we were in it a total of 4 times throughout our short stay They did not knock but simply used their access key to come into the room at various points throughout the day 3 Staff weren t outright rude but made no attempt to ensure a pleasant stay very apathetic   The location was excellent Close to main district but the nicer end away from the hustle and bustle The lollies around the lobby were a nice touch

We only had 3 nights   Absolutely fantastic hotel in a perfect location with fantastic staff and Lucretia accommodation The pools were lovely and very relaxed Pool bar excellent and fanstatic value for money Will be back next year and the year after that too

Maid service was slightly erratic Sometime clearing items that we needed like an unfinished bottle of wine and sometime leaving items like empty water bottles and rubbish rather should have been cleared Standard of cleanliness otherwise good  Excellent hotel in a central location Lovely decor and very comfortable rooms Welcome drink on arrival was an added bonus
Breakfast room in a basement No bar on the rooftop  Late check out Great bedroom even though de Luxe is not worth it just a bath on your terrace terrace on the 1st floor with no view

WiFi connection not that good on arrival we were asked for the debit card that we booked the hotel on which we did not take with us and the receptionist was quite aggressive towards us demanding that we provide it We didn t need that after travelling All the other staff were lovely   We liked the position of the hotel very easy to walk to everything complimentary drink in the reception very nice touch Most of the staff were lovely and very helpful especially the concierge
More knowledge in gluten free foods and ability to access a room to freshen up before flying home  Attention to detail hidden extras Plus staff were incredible

The pools were more plunge pools than actual pools but were still nice Our A C wouldn t cool the room down to the temperature we wanted I had called the front desk and was told the temp would kick in within 10 mins of us setting the temperature but it never did We were there for 4 days and the room never cooled down below 25 degrees even though the thermostat was set for 19 degrees I also think the temperature was locked to be eco friendly because we couldn t get the temperature to set to anything below 19 degrees either Not a big deal since we were only there to shower and sleep but it is the reason I gave it a good rating vs an excellent rating for room facilities I prefer my room on the cool side to sleep Hotel breakfast was good but a bit pricey at 23 euros per person We only ate there on our last day   Hotel was nicely situated in the heart of Barcelona s most popular areas The ladies at the bar Paola and Adriana were fantastic and took great care of us each evening Definitely a very nice hotel with great decor They also provided gummy candies throughout the on the main level and bar areas along with coffee stations for when the bar was closed Nice lobby and bar seating areas We stayed in room 609 and it was a nice sized room with a view of the internal area elevator shaft
nothing comes to mind  great location for all that Barcelona has to offer Staff were excellent from check in right the way through Breakfast very good Hotel decor is great will definitely stay again
Air conditioning a little strong   Very friendly and helpful staff Very comfortable bed in the city center close to public transportation airport transportation placa de Catalunya

No glasses cleared from the room for our entire stay The pool photo is exceptionally well taken the pool is actually pretty small and situated by the bar with people drinking smoking eating we didn t use it once in the end Drinks on arrival we didn t receive anything until we raised this even though we saw multiple guests arrive and receive a much warmer welcome than we had   Breakfast was very nice a little steep if you re not going to destroy the all you can eat side of things Great location for all things touristy Local cava served in the hotel was very nice and reasonably priced

The location is excellent It s just steps off of Plaza Catalunya the hottest hub in the city but it s quiet The staff couldn t be nicer or more helpful The bottle of wine and chocolate truffles in my room upon arrival were lovely and there is a gourmet coffee machine and tea in the room with free bottled water replenished daily

nothing   we booked the cheapest room via booking com upon arrival we like many others were upgraded to a room with a balcony facing the lower pool the room was well decorated the linens and layout stylish the bed very comfortable we enjoyed the upgraded room the less expensive rooms look out into a central courtyard elevator shaft which would have been a bit claustrophobic or to the main street a word of warning though we were on the 2nd floor and for those people who book the 1st floor rooms with the private hot tubs all the rooms above can see down into your private hot tub since the triangular shade over the spa doesn t completely block the view from above we were surprised and happy to receive a complementary bottle of wine and chocolates on our first night the in room espresso maker was appreciated I didn t realize that the property had two pools prior to booking which was nice The vibe of the hotel is hip but still very comfortable and relaxed Front desk services very friendly We did not eat there nor did we get breakfast but we were very pleased with the hotel the linens the amenities he location is superb very central to shopping the Gothic quarter transportation airport bus subway La Rambla restaurants If I return to Barcelona I would definitely stay there again and would recommend to friends

Lack of natural light from windows due to being on 1st floor facing atrium I also arrived late at night but it was very quiet at night as requested away from the busy street I would like to see an improvement on english tv channels besides just BBC World News As a solo female traveller i don t stay out too long after dinner and i like to relax with a movie or some other comedy entertainment show This was seriously lacking   In the lobby reception area they had jars of sweet treats that guests were able to help themselves to they left a stack of napkins and a pair of tongs for picking up sweets The complimentary water that were in glass bottles placed in the room really makes a difference Walking distance from hotel to alot of major sights and attractions Wifi is decent Never dropped signal during my stay Shower had excellent pressure and bathroom came with luxurious bathrobes

Only a couple of small niggles At check in they didn t give us any information about the surrounding area or show us where to find our room which are the small things that make a difference to a stay Also the used glasses from out welcome drink and complementary wine didn t get cleared from the room during our stay   Bed really comfy the room was clean and the shower was great The view from our balcony was nice our room was on the back of the hotel overlooking the pool and seating area The lobby bar area was smart and the sweets in the bar were a nice touch

The overall character of the hotel was very good even though it is in a very busy part of the city because it has excellent sound proofing the noise is very minimal The staff could not have been more helpful it won t be the last time we stay in an H10 hotel A really enjoyable first visit to Barcelona

Rooms not very big But clean and comfy Not bad for a city hotel   The location of the H10 Metropolitan is amazing Central to everything and outside there is a sidewalk with street cafe s and the most wonderful buzz We loved our stay The staff is so friendly and helpful

The staff were friendly and helpful at all times but in particular the young lady that assisted us when we arrived very early from our cruise ship was exceptional The hotel was a perfect sanctuary in a busy city that we had not visited before

The shower recess was stained and definitely needed attention   We enjoyed our stay at H10 Metropolitan The staff were exceptionally helpful and we loved being so close to restaurants bars shops and places of interest The bed was so comfy and room service was of a high standard and not too expensive
Staff were really friendly and helpful Hotel was very clean Good location on Las Ramblas but on the quiet end of the road 3 minutes walk to all shops and lots of restaurants near by

wish the mini gym had a little more equipment thought wish breakfast opened a bit earlier though so people with early flights could enjoy a last meal we were very rushed also breakfast opened about five minutes late which wouldn t be a big deal most days but on our last rushed morning before heading out to the airport it made a big difference   the hotel was great breakfast spread was very impressive albeit a little heavy on the carbs sweet breads staff was very kind and accommodating while the facilities were very good location was so convenient

No microwave In the room but there was a fridge I read the breakfast was pricey so we skipped it and ate elsewhere The staff looked at me a little crazy when I asked to reheat my food likely very American of me but it was cool   The room we stayed in had a private jacuzzi and was great It was not 100 private as far as visibility from other guests and apartments were concerned but it was ours only to use with some privacy The bed was great and the bathroom was perfect as well The size of the room could have been slightly larger around the bed but it was not a deal breaker The lobby is very stylish clean and chic They offer you sparkling wine water or juice upon arrival Overall the staff were extremely pleasant and helpful I would stay here again Shopping restaurants bars 24 grocery and many tourists attractions are all within blocks of the hotel A location this hotel is in the middle of it ALL

There should be a bar on rooftop or at least be able to call from the rooftop and it gets delivered The bed is abit too firm for my liking Otherwise huge kingsize large bathroom and great pillow selection  The hotel overall was very beautiful great staff and location is excellent
Gymnasium could be larger   Clever design fabulous location brilliant staff The small touches made all the difference Great value for money and fabulous service

Nothing   The hotel was beautiful very shabby chic just beautiful the staff were always helpful Location for shopping is excellent the selection for breakfast was the best I have ever seen wouldn t hesitate to book this hotel again

The only thing missing was a box of tissues in the room   We were greeted at the taxi drop off stand by a hotel Rep Excellent location and service The staff is very efficient Little candies everywhere coffee in the room and lobby and lounge Immaculate hotel many cafes all around and excellent tapas a block a way Close to Placa Catalunya but none of the noise We would definitely stay here again We were upgraded to a lovely room with a terrace overlooking the pool

Nothing it was lovely Would definitely stay again  The check in was the best I ve ever had We got in at 10 o clock at night the girl on reception gave us a map of the city and explained where everything was and how to get there train taxi etc
Absolutely nothing   Every thing perfect for a short break location facilities staff and food reception fabulous breakfast wonderful can t recommend enough
Actually it was our honeymoon the staff were welcoming and so nice Breakfast was perfect The swimming pool is cozy and nice to have some coffee at night The room was big enough clean and quite
Street below was very noisy but there s only so much the hotel can have control over  Attention to detail bottle of wine in room chocolate treats left for us Nespresso machine was lovely

All was okay no issues   Barcelona s Metropolitan 10 Hotel is ideally located Steps from the Metro the main Tourist Information service It s between two pedestrian walking streets one the famous Las Ramblas filled with cafes and pretty historical architecture Hotel has a boutique vibe comfy lounge relaxing garden patio tucked in the back of hotel quieter side with plants flowers eclectic furnishings and bar there s cool down pool both on patio and one on upper floor roof overlook located by it s small workout room Room a Queen bed was super comfy and came with 5pillows Staff were friendly and helpful w maps calling a taxi and greeting you with a refreshment upon arrival and suggested walk route in the neighborhood

Really comfortable room And you get both on the one side a calm place to relax because of the nice backyard with pool and bar and the balcony with backyard view On the other side you can experience the pulse of city life by sitting on the rooftop terrace and looking down to the Rambla and Placa Catalunya Great place to start sightseeing or shopping because just a few minutes to walk to the Ramblas and the metro station

If you wish to work your fitness during the stay note that the gym is really mini just as mentioned in the hotel description   A heaven of serenity in the busy and lively center of Barcelona The friendliness of the staff and their helpful and competent advices to organize our Barcelona experience were a real plus The hotels interior design is quite unique original and tasteful Our room was large enough with a balcony on the quite inner court side and equipped with all amenities that make a hotel stay comfortable and enjoyable You can t get any closer to the city center and the main attractions but it s hassle free to get there by car and to park in the adjacent public underground garage at a preferential rate The rooftop plunge pool area is a perfect place to relax overlooking the buzzing Plaza Catalunya

The street noise was a bit loud but we were right in the heart of the night life so wasn t too bad   Location was close to central Barcelona With the buses 1 min walk away Staff were very attentive and friendly even remembered my birthday and surprised me with champagne and a cake and candle

The interiors and rooms are quite industrial in design but you need to step back and appreciate the design elements throughout the hotel and colour tones that compliment the city environment  Excellent breakfast selection cooked breakfast made to Oder at no extra cost waiter service for coffee juice etc nothing was too much Great central location with all main attractions in walking distance Bar staff in the evening attentive excellent roof top plunge pool great to relax by after day out seeing the sites recommend for a great weekend break On arrival welcome drink whilst you checked in unexpected but really nice touch as was the complimentary water in room and bottle of wine on our first night whilst staying Recommended

The staff is friendly and kindly replied to my inquiries I was lucky my room was upgraded to the best possible though I ve stayed for one night I ve enjoyed The room is clean and it has everything you need Courtesy of hotel included a bottle of wine water and sweets Also the hotel provides a discount for the parking if you decide to stay at Saba parking which is right under the hotel

Did not clean our room properly on our 2nd day left rubbish in our room and not replacing our dirty glasses with clean ones   Excellent location Breakfast was very good Large selection from the buffet Also cooked breakfast available which was very good
Perfect in every way  The staff were extremely pleasant welcoming and knowledgeable about the area where to eat and how to get around lovely lovely staff and very friendly
The staff were extremely helpful when we ask anything Location was fantastic to everything shops walking distance to port hop on hop off buses etc

Maybe mention in which Public Parking that you partner with clients can leave their car already before they arrive I guessed it right from the first time but it can be confusing   The free upgrade to a top floor room with terrace Such a wonderful room if I come back I would definitely book this one straight away

The staff were very friendly and helpful super attention to detail appreciated complimentary treats for our anniversary birthday celebrations Lovely shower comfy bed and gorgeous foyer hotel signature scent Great location for catching buses to sightsee and to wander from in the evening to find a restaurant Would definitely stay again

The toilet floors got really wet when we used the shower   Bed was comfortable and room was very clean Excellent location and there were complimentary tea coffee making facilities Hotel also surprised us with a bottle of cava and cake as we were there over a birthday
House keeping personnel knocking and entering in sunday morning early even a don t disturb is put on the door   Geographical location Nice building and confort level

As we were in the centre it could become a little noisey at night due to traffic and bars by the hotel We expected this being in the centre The pools are on the small side but we were only there for a couple of days and didn t use them   This was a brilliant hotel great location friendly staff and little extras that made the stay prefect for my partners birthday they left a bottle of cava and piece of birthday cake in the room for when we got back I asked for a room higher up with a balcony and it didn t disappoint you could look right down into the square great for people watching The shower was amazing too lots of power and always warm beds very comfortable Just outside the hotel you had a metro and in the square the hop on hop off bus and aerobus everything you need to get around the city We would recommend this hotel and would definitely stay again in any other H10 hotels We really enjoyed are time in Barcelona so much to see and do what a fantastic city
Couldn t find a fault it was excellent overall   Excellent location just across the square from the Aerobus stop friendly staff lovely room with modern decor

On returning from a night out and in the lobby area relaxing we were approached 10 minutes later and asked to provide evidence that we were actually staying at the hotel which we found rude   The staff facilities and overall look feel of hotel was fantastic and the lobby area was a great place to relax
The room had no window and I felt a little claustophobic I asked for a nice room and got the impression that booking com rates were considered low priority unfortunately   Location great

We ve got to stop in our room during the day and when we ve arrived to hotel our room was left open nobody inside Cleaning lady went somewhere and have not returned for at least five minutes more like 10 so all of our belongings were left there unprotected Anybody could have entered and take anything from our stuff Moreover when got back to our room in the night on the same day we ve found out that cleaning was not finished no clean towels provided even though we ve stopped at the reception to report the security incident in the afternoon they ve not bothered to make sure everything was alright and I had to call a reception again to get fresh towels Otherwise our stay would be just fine but this security cleaning topic made it the worst stay I have had in Barcelona stayed in Pulitzer Regina etc especially considering the fact that we ve informed the reception staff   Location
Very small room No space for storage Uncomfortable bed Very noisy from other room   Location Staff was very friendly and helpful specially those at reception

The staff were so friendly and accomdating we went for a couple of nights and stayed in the room with the hot tub on the balcony which was amazing It was my partners 30TH and the staff left a complementary bottle of cava and a cake in our room with a birthday message from the staff Brilliant staff and service
If you choose a road facing room you will here street noise although the outlook is nice Internal facing rooms will probably be quieter   Attitude helpfulness of staff and the general ambiance

the hotel offered a glass of wine on booking in sent us free complimentary drink and chocolates we asked advice on city and they were very helpful everything they did was excellent and everyone was friendly

Bedrooms are a little small but adequate for a short stay Upgraded rooms are same size but with bigger balcony terrace We were unlucky with taxi drivers who did not appear to know the hotel location but managed to get us fairly close with only a short walk   The bed was really comfy with a choice of pillows Complimentary tea coffee and bottled water in the room The staff noticed it was my husbands birthday the day we arrived and sent a bottle champagne and cake to the room Good quality toiletries replaced daily The staff extremely helpful and pleasant and always acknowledged us either entering or leaving the hotel

The gym consisted of a treadmill and a stationary bike in a tiny room The room was quite small for being a superior room and the closet space was tiny   Hotel is stylish its location is great and the breakfast was excellent

On arrival we where informed that we had been upgraded Id booked a room at the front The upgrade was at the back It should have been offered not assumed Went back down to reception and asked for the room I booked Ended up with a room with disabled toilet next to the cleaning cupboard But apart from that it was a lovely stay   Breakfast lovely Nice atmosphere
The location is perfectly in the city centre with two nearby Metro stations The staff are friendly and give good advice on restaurants and places to visit
Everything Great location an amazing service and staff Couldn t ask for more Great hospitality Amazing breakfast but expensive For sure we will come again

It s a big city filled with lots of people so those who prefer to have a bit more space and a slower pace may find this neighbourhood busy for their personal preferences   Great lobby and friendly staff welcome you right off the bustling street The location is in a very central location for sightseeing and shopping but the hotel is like a little haven of peace Welcome drink and very friendly staff greeted us Large areas inside and out to relax in

On arrival we were greated by the fantastic staff and given complementary drinks Then On check in we were upgraded to a balcony suite which was amazing Lovely room with nice facilities very comfortable coffee machine and lint chocolates topped up every day also It was my girlfriends birthday that weekend so when we came back after a lovely day out we were greated in our bedroom by a hand written letter from the hotel saying happy Birthday to her Along with that a bottle of bubbly and a chocolate cake too I was very impressed with the attention to detail the staff gave to everything It s a great hotel clean and comfortable with a fantastic location right in downtown Barcelona I will be back there

There was a lot of commotion outside everyday not so sure if i was stuff next to the laundry or storage closet Lack of English speaking TV channels A little pricey for what s on offer but I suppose location makes up for that   Very good selection of breakfast Superb location Staff were very friendly
The size of the standard room was definitely too tiny in spite of high ceilings and with a bathroom related to a doll house   The location and the buffet breakfast

As with most city hotels the rooms are very small there was very little storage space even in the bathroom there was no where to hang towels etc   The young vibrant staff extremely helpful The location was excellent very easy to get around Even in reception there was champagne and water available at no charge Excellent variety of options for breakfast Would highly recommend staying here for a city break

No tissues I had a cold and there were no tissues supplied in the room Also the king bed was two twins pushed together and made separately so my husband and I were separated by sheets and blankets   The location of the hotel is wonderful for strolling las ramblas or for catching a hop on hop off bus The room was very comfortable and the balcony overlooking the pool area was nice The shower was outstanding with an actual rainshower fixture and plenty of hot water The staff were super friendly and spoke perfect English
Nothing  Everything was perfect got free room upgrade and champagne and chocolate for my birthday have already recommended hotel to others would definitely pick a h10 hotel again
Great hotel in great location Beautiful design comfortable and clean room with a spacious terrace with Jacuzzi Really good breakfast and very professional and nice staff

Provided kettle and tea but no coffee mugs only espresso shot sized cups   Excellent size bed and great shower head Also loved the hot tub that we had on the terrace Great way to relax after sight seeing Very helpful and friendly staff

They could open the breakfast a little bit earlier It open 0730 BUT the good thing the offered breakfast box thank you   This is a great design hotel The service is excellent and the staff is very friendly They served a fantastick breakfast and our son who has gluten got the same standard and the same lovely breakfast Goldstar and the best Glutenfree breakfast he ever had thank you

there was some building noise nearby which was a bit of a shame  very helpful staff Great surprise to find a bottle of cava and chocolates in our room as our visit was for a special occasion the breakfast was amazing

I may be asking too much but I wished that the receptionist checking me in could have been a little more attentive to my telling her that I didn t have the time right now as I was 1 hour late for a meeting and a little more lenient flexible and not try to get everything done upon check in but leave things for later if it was possible   everything else was excellent I wish I could have stayed a little longer
Staff entered when i had the DND sign up Small hanging space in wardrobe   Very friendly and helpful As much Free water and coffee as required Clean rooms

Very little to dislike There was a marginal delay at checkout but otherwise this was an excellent hotel   The hotel was in a very good location being close to the city centre The room was very nice and kept spotlessly clean There was a good choice of food for breakfast The best thing of all was the staff who were all very friendly and efficient English was widely spoken I was offered a glass of champagne at check in and was given a great welcome on arrival
Little pricey but nothing that we did not like We recommend this place   Staff friendly and professional Our room faces the front street not too noisy because of the double pane windows
Room wasn t quite ready at check in time but we believe this was a one off and we were unlucky but was worth the wait   Excellent variety for breakfast and couldn t ask for a better location
The pool could of been larger and in saying that it was fine   Great location beautiful bedrooms nice and helpful staff I would love to go back and stay in the hotel again in the future

The staff are not that experienced in the better restaurants so best to make your own or make sure they understand exactly what you are looking for in dining   Great location Close to Plaza Catalunya Walk everywhere but the Metro and buses are nearby We had an outdoor area with a hot tub Quite nice Great breakfast Very comfortable and an all around good value

Paying around 570 Euros for 2 nights for a not very big size room without breakfast is really really a lot   Perfect location just by Plaza Catalunya Good isolation on the windows as the noice did not disturb at all even though we had balcony to the busy street

The bed could have been better otherwise the entire hotel experience is positive   Staff are very kind Facilities is very modern and clean Very strong wifi throughout the hotel Very nice lounge area and bar

Staff s recommendation of restaurant is not that good   You stay in the center where it is very near a metro near la rambla and a lot of restaurant choices I like the breakfast provided with really very good choices Rooms are nice with big toilet and shower room

Friendly staff Good location Convenient to shopping and restaurants If you are planning on spending time at the beach you would need to be closer to the water Terrific breakfast Getting a room with a balcony gives you more space

The first room I got that I actually booked was tiny with a small window to inside of hotel I changed for extra 35 EUR per night for a room with a terrace to the inner yard When you sit on the terrace you get all sorts of smells of cooking and garbage The wardrobe is tiny I could hardly fit 3 shirts in it Also I checked out at 9 am and as the hotel was full the staff could have offered me a small discount for checking out earlier Overpriced   The staff is very nice and location is great
Everything was perfect Staff amazing friendly professional helpful Rooms spot on Just a wonderful hotel Price of drinks etc a little high but not too bad for such a top hotel

Size of the room  The hotel is beautiful modern and clean Staff is very helpful and welcoming Our room with the terrace is very nice though a little small There is not enough closet space for clothes to hang

We arrived at 2pm but were not able to check in until 3pm Not acceptable after 10 hours travelling   location was excellent Staff were friendly Hotel was as expected for a quality city hotel Got a free bottle of Cava and chocolate cake in the room for my husbands birthday Nice touch
Staff extremely friendly and helpful very courteous and kind from the moment we arrived to the moment we left nothing was too much trouble 10 out of 10

One thing only should have stayed longer   Every thing and best of all first hotel I ve ever come across in Europe that has an iron hotels of Europe can certainly learn from this very special place Also amazing breakfast my daughter and I loved staying Thank you

Underground public parking was 27 50 a night which we thought excessive although we were in the middle of Barcelona Had trouble leaving parking even after paying the bill as hotel had not validated ticket and took us 30 mins   Comfortable bedroom with terrace overlooking pool area Excellent bathroom with large walk in shower Complimentary sangria and water in room

The special added touch of Champagne and chocolate covered Strawberries very nice The staff were so friendly and very helpful Also couldn t believe how empty the pools were they were a saviour on those 30 degree days loved the rooftop one

Fantastic hotel in every area The breakfast was something to behold as is every member of staff The room was spotless and a good size beds really comfortable Pool and bar area perfect Great location in a vibrant lively city Will definitely stay again
No complaints would definitely revisit   Rooms very well equipped very comfortable bed great bar and lounge facilities and pool Location central to everything Excellent value for money
Nothing everything was brilliant  Interior design by Lazaro was excellent staff brilliant very clean central location Could not fault this great hotel

2 singles beds instead of real large bed even if we reserved a real large bed Rooftop pool is sadly very very quiet Maybe music Something to make it more attractive Gym is not worth to mention But better than nothing if you need to stretch up your legs and burns calories  Best breakfast buffet Great hotel clean well decorated Friendly staff

The location is perfect everything is close and the place is vibrant and lively Breakfast is extraordinary and offers an extensive variety of food I ve never had a better breakfast in my entire life The staff is extremely polite and they go out of their way to make your stay as enjoyable as possible

My only suggestion is to cool the hallways they were hot and had dreary decor   Great location super clean wonderful staff great view Beds were comfy room was spacious and very comfortable We really loved the location and we really enjoyed our stay Will definitely stay again and recommend to others

Nothing really to complain about if something to wish we would have appreciated some more cupboard space as it was very limited   Great location next to Plaza Catalunya easy to go out for sightseeing and come back to enjoy the pool Room in itself was not huge in fact quite small but enough for two and we had also a balcony to bring some additional space recommend to book a room with a view to pool
Nothing I would gladly stay here again and gladly recommend to friends   The hotel was beautifully designed The staff was very accommodating and friendly We enjoyed every minute of our stay
Housekeeping service is a bit early Even if you have do not disturb sign in place it s not good to hear the vacum cleaner next to your room at 9am   Excellent location with friendly staff

The price of breakfast   Lovely sun terrace with hot tub great cocktails comfy bed very helpful staff Only one negative hugely expensive breakfast which we didn t bother to check out who can eat 23 worth of food for breakfast
Its not a 5 star hotel but u dont expect anything more from this hotelfor a short stay I recomend this hotel to all visitors to barcelona Nevertheless to mention the location the staff the price

We had to wait for the room to be ready but this was compensated by 2 delicious cocktails on the terrace excellent   Had the room with hottub it was perfect While enjoying it someone from hotel came in and brought us 2 nice bottles of sangria Complete fun Breakfast was amazing never seen a variety like this before

Room a bit noisy The door and walls are thin and you can really hear people talking on the hall way Sometimes we can even hear kids crying through walls   Very central location close to metro and transportation hub Lots of good shopping and restaurants nearby Hotel decor is modern and really clean Free coffee and water in the room are great bonus
Can t think of a negative point to be honest   Super friendly staff always willing to help Great rooms top notch breakfast 2 little swimming pools ideal for a refreshing break
Everything was amazing and totally exceeded our expectations Hotel is in a superb location and the staff couldn t do enough for us We will definitely be back

Only observation is it would be a bonus to have a shower facility available for guests who have checked out but have the day before flying home Check out is midday which is good though Happy to look after your bags which is always helpful   All good really No complaints Staff lovely Location good but noisy at night but double glazed Windows helped and this is city centre location so you really have to expect that Rooms at the back would solve this We were front
Nothing   Great location and the choice of two swimming pools was a bonus Very quiet at night and the balcony was a pleasant place to sit and watch the sun go down

The room sun terrace was overlooked all round which we weren t expecting would have been better to know this when we booked and there was no shade provided on our terrace   Pool was nice at the end of a days exploring The breakfast was excellent

For what we needed it was perfect   The Hotel was lovely and clean and very welcoming The staff in particular Victor was amazing He has a brilliant knowledge of Barcelona and gave us some great recommendations Perfect location just 3 min walk from La Rambla
Didn t get a replacement of coffee second day and jacuzzi was a little dirty before use  The shower was great bed full of zzzzz and a jacuzzi on the terrace to relax and a great location

One strange moment was a bottle of water out of the mini bar miraculously became half full after we had been out for the day This was very odd and it was not like this when we arrived at the hotel A little bit worrying to think it was someone like a cleaner who drank it as they are trusted to enter your room where all your possessions are However no times of ours were touched or taken in any way so no issue but just a little odd that s all   The hotel is in an excellent location we were able to shop sight see sun bathe and nip out for food and then pop back to the room to freshen up easily The staff were always friendly and happy to help when ever called upon The staff at the bar pool side were very good especially one man who was always darting about and waiting upon us like we were royalty Amazing The room was very clean very comfortable and perfect for escaping the busy city

The room needs to be vacuumed daily  The front office and dining room as well as bar staff are very pleasant and helpful Eager to assist and ensure guest comfort The location is very central and ideal for sightseeing A wide spread at breakfast with great staff in the dining room

Hotel room doors need better sound insulation especially rooms by the elevators   Very friendly and helpful staff free Cava when checking into the hotel beautiful modern hotel design rooftop plunge pool plus ground level pool

Our room was noisy u could hear the road at the front no bath in bathroom  I liked the fact that there was a Buffett breakfast but they came round to order hot breakfast made fresh and poured ur coffee and juice not just Buffett left for hours prosecco on arrival and in reception to help ur self coffee pods in room with nespresso machine we were delivered choc strawberries and sangria and chocs lovely touch with two bottles of water in room complimentary

I loved the decor the great staff and the location We could walk to the Gothic Quarter and were close to other restaurants shops and sites as well The location near Placa Catalunya was also convenient for catching a bus or metro to more distant places Short taxi from train station Highly recommend

Couldn t recommended this hotel more Perfect location in Barcelona with everything in walking distance The room was lovely very clean and modern The rooftop pool was a highlight to chill at too

We were in room 301 which was the disabled room but there was a really bad smell from the bathroom I think when you book through your website I have noticed that hotels give you the disabled room   Location

Nothing really it was all just perfect although I did feel that breakfast was Very expensive so we skipped it and went to a local cafe   The bed was more comfy than my one at home Definitely try and book the rooms with terrace and sun loungers Even if you don t end up using the jacuzzi The rooms were small but the hotel made up for it and it was so quiet and comfortable

The repairs being done on the room next to us It happen to be a discomfort during the day I would recommend not providing the room to anyone   Friendly staff at the hotel They were able to help with booking

Cost of breakfast is a bit on the dear side better to get out with hotel staff didn t follow through a request for directions for an excursion we had planned for second day after saying they would sort it out just as well for tourist info centre they were fab Nice hotel but needs to polish up on a few issues  Fantastic location

gym was too small   bottle of champagne and treats day of arrival comfortable and wonderful location very cute decor and ambiance throughout the hotel with everything we needed to make it an enjoyable stay

Nothing bad to say at all  Outstanding staff upon check in Adrian was very warm welcoming and very helpful with telling us about local places to visit and restaurants to eat at His English was also excellent which was very helpul

Balcony doors not sound proof from street noise  Special touches such as welcome drinks when you enter foyer arrival of champagne n chocolates to our room welcoming us to the hotel comfy bed amazing shower with great pressure overall wonderful and helpful staff in all areas

Nothing  Loved this hotel Stayed here for 3 nights during the Easter Week It was the perfect place with the main bustle of Las Ramblas a five minute walk away past the Plaza Catalunya and you have the high end shopping of Passeig de Gracia just a block away Being away from Las Ramblas is comforting since it s more quiet and no crowds around the hotel There s a convenience store around the corner and if you go across the plaza to El Corte Ingles a huge department store with a full supermarket at the basement The front staff was very welcoming and accommodating Super attentive and quick to give suggestions on great places to eat The best thing was Eden bar at the lobby of the hotel which had a very Art Deco feel totally perfect place to relax for a cup of coffee or a glass of cava Bar staff was attentive as well The rooms were smallish but it was a decent size Clean nicely decorated rooms and a very spacious king sized bed On our last morning we had breakfast at the basement restaurant The Kitchen Quite pricey 20 person as expected but we found be it had great ambiance decent food and very welcoming staff

Great accessible location We took the A2 airport to central La Catalunya bus as we landed in Terminal 2 The bus journey is a non stop service and takes roughly 30 minutes We paid 6 for a single ticket as we were unsure of how we would travel back to the airport at the time The hotel is a 15 minute walk from central La Catalunya La Ramblas is a 10 minute walk away so really ideal You re away from all the noise yet close enough to walk there The hotel Amazing hotel with unique decor Really comfortable rooms providing the necessities such as towels shower gel shampoo conditioner a shower cap and a shaving kit Great for those staying for a short time with only hand luggage Great views from our hotel room as well as from the 360 hotel rooftop bar Easy to access using the hotel lift and just phenomenal views They have a bar which is reasonably priced Definitely worth it to view a sunset The pool is quite small which is why I scored it in the middle We didn t check the pool size and not sure if the dimensions are on their website but we were prepared with our swimming gear in case however they didn t come to use The hotel breakfast This was complimentary in our price and the breakfast was delicious Great coffee machine with teas available too Good selection of fruits breads juices cakes as well as sausages scrambled eggs mushrooms tomatoes and bacon They even have a toastie so you can make your own grilled sandwiches with sliced meats and cheese provided P S We were handled by Irene at reception who was really helpful She gave us the advice we required as well as handy tips and recommendations Thank you Irene
nothing worth mentioning  friendly staff and good facilities location good for walking around Ramblas and other sites slightly down at heel microlocation but minor compared with all other benefits

Walking on the surrounding area late at night was scared me on the first few days Because of old dirty and dark narrow streets but it was OK and we try to avoid those streets and not go back to the hotel too late   Everything in the hotel was perfect breakfast was excellent and lots of choices Fresh fruits

A modern designed hotel clean and friendly However with some flaws each small but all adding because of the limited size of the rooms the architect opted not for one enclosed bathroom but three separate parts which are also combined with the closet The closet door doubles as the toilet door too Not the most convenient Also the hotel has only 3 elevators for its total 200 rooms and 13 floors causing quite a wait for an elevator to come The room windows are locked preventing open air Small desk not allowing comfortable use
Quite loud at times the location is good and central but quite a scary area at night   Excellent location in that it is short walk from las ramblas clean hotel spacious room

Lifts are too small and need to wait for a long time The hotel leaves a note in every room to ask customers help them save water and energy to reuse the towels If we d like to help we need to hang up the towels they didn t say where We did it with only one hook in the bathroom Then the next day the cleaner took away all the hand towels including the clean ones and the wet ones for an unknown reason and just left two bath towels for the whole family Don t really understand the reason why Its inconvenient to call them and constantly ask for more towels   Good size bed and good bathroomshower Roof garden has stunning view Staffs are friendly

The website mentioned that there was a rooftop pool and a jacuzzi the water was too cold for these to be used they should be listed as seasonal and it should be made clear that the jacuzzi is not in the wellness centre but on the rooftop The wellness centre has a great little gym and a nice sauna however when I went to use the sauna it wasn t on So I wasn t able to make use of the sauna jacuzzi or pool all of which were featured why I booked this hotel The area that the hotel is in is good in terms of being a short walk from the main tourist strip and the gothic area harbour and beach However it s a very edgy area and there were lots of prostitutes and other characters around that made it feel risky to walk back late at night I was travelling with my daughter and we ended up coming in early every night as the local area didn t feel safe The room initially didn t have a coffee machine even though this was listed on the site I asked for one which they brought but it didn t work It was frustrating my daughter is coeliac and I am lactose intolerant so having breakfast in the room was necessary as not many cafes can cater for us Lastly on our third day we left the sign on the door asking for our room to be cleaned and went out for 6 hours when we returned it hadn t been cleaned The maids apologised we went out again for another hour or more and still it wasn t cleaned I would expect better service considering I feel this hotel rides on its aesthetics and unfortunately the service and facilities don t live up to it I ve stayed in cheaper places recently where they have been more attentive we have had much more space been in a better area and have had Netflix and YouTube available on the tv as well as all the foreign channels There was nothing at all to watch on the tv and no way of connecting the phone to it as the tv was old   The overall design of the hotel is great the view from the rooftop bar is amazing The staff were welcoming when we arrived the beds and shower in the room were lovely

Room very warm even with air conditioning on   Unusual design The roof top terrace with 360 degrees panoramic views are must Enjoy at night with a cocktail Great bathroom very open plan No cramped bath just a large shower cubicle

The bedroom was very modern but washbasin and mirror impractical Shower dangerous as slippery floor surface The towels were thin and should have been replaced Quiet room though   Beds and pillows very comfy 360 bar was great fantastic views of Barcelona Reception and other areas very trendy
Superior triple room was very small and cramped very little storage area No separate bathroom some things did not work well   Location easy walking distance to many areas

Nothing major except that the swimming pool is best described as a plunge pool very small the pictures descriptions give a completely false impression   Breakfasts were very good but a bit expensive The position of the hotel was excellent v close to La Rambla main square and the port with shops restaurants and bars all 5 mins walk

The service it wasn t that good I had a broken glass at night time and I ask someone from reception to send someone to clean and nobody came And the next day when the cleaners came the didn t clean probably because the was still glasses on the floor

One of the worst places we have ever stayed for sure I have travelled all around the world but this place for sure deserves to be entitled campsite They are under staffed and over loaded You ask for some ice and get charged 5 Euros even for delivering food to your room they charged you 5 They don t change the bedsheets and pillow case assuming that you would not find out They just turn them around and use the same dirty sheets The location of the hotel is awfull where you seriously fear for your life if you want to go out after 8 pm Even taxi drivers refuse to drop you off there Honestly there is no management at all Btw your breakfast was awful and the same Sh every day I will never ever stay at your awful place again and not even recommend your campsite to my enemies For the people from some countries your campsite may look alright but let s face it you are not even close to being fine   Nothing at all

Staff in the ground floor bar were not very attentive Waited 20 minutes to be asked what we would like to drink Had to go and ask at the bar after this time   The bed was very comfy Excellent view from our room
Our room was located on the fifth floor there was a little bit of Street noise  Fantastic hotel great location and just a stones throw away from the main strip Really enjoyed our stay there
We were made to wait an hour and a half to check in but were reimbursed for this by the staff   It was a beautiful modern and unique hotel with excellent staff

In the reception area are a row of small coffee tables the stains that appeared on the tables on our first night were still there when we left as I say silly things but also important but overall a good impression The welcome glass of Cava was a lovely touch   The bed was the most comfortable ever The view was of a busy city lovely to just sit and watch clean towels clean bed Very quirky lounge lovely views from the roof terrace I think the breakfast arrangement needs a little tweeking silly things like where do you lay your plate when you want to fill it Silly little things that would make a big difference Was not too happy with dinner menu and I think expensive

Slow service from the barman really slow A little dark in some parts of the hotel eg stairs down to the basement toilet from reception had to hold onto the handrail   We were given a free upgrade to a junior suite which was great The bed was fantastic and great views across the city Fantastic location and staff very helpful Restaurant manager was great we arrived a little late and the restaurant was not taking any further bookings but he squeezed us in which was very welcome given that it was late and torrential rain outside The rooftop terrace bar is lovely We were given a restaurant recommendation by reception which was fab

I wasn t a huge fan of the location of the hotel Whilst we did not experience any issues I didn t feel very comfortable walking around in the evening near the hotel   The hotel was very nice and the rooms very modern The rooftop bar was also a bonus

Noisy in the evenings from outside we were on the third floor to the rear of the building Room cleaning very slow to happen twice we arrived back at the room around 4 30pm and it hadn t been done   Food and staff were brilliant

The lighting within the room  The bed was amazing absolutely huge the veiw was stunning and the staff were very friendly and helpful The location was superb Only downside is how dark the lighting is and the extra keen housekeepers who wouldnt stop knocking even with the sign up

the stuff was robotic inattentive the room was dirty i didn t wanted to shower bathroom was very slippy sheets had holes in it towels were hard wifi weak minibar poorly stocked and overpriced   no breakfast incl

They kept turning off the air conditioning so when there were no windows to open it was very stuffy until the air con kicked in again Kept asking for more milk but didn t get it until the 3 request Wouldn t stop us staying there again  Clean fresh and modern Not too far to walk to anywhere Friendly staff Didn t eat there so can t comment on the food

Little bit noise in the mornings when staff start cleaning other bedrooms   Every member of the staff is ready to help always with a smile The bed is super comfortable and the attention to detail in the decoration is superb Gym facilities are great Get a glass of wine and go to the terrace to admire the view breathtaking
Cooked buffet breakfast not hot enough  Room modern bright and clean Roof terrace with view of city bar in summer Located not far from La Rambla Breakfast choice good

Only negative for us was the bathroom sink and the fact that the toilet didnt have ventilation   The beds were amazing To the point where my friends and i considered asking the hotel staff what brand the matresses were

The set up of the room was not very convenient Especially the bathroom facilities were lacking privacy I would prefer a bathroom as a separate room with a door that closes Also the fact that you could either have the closet open or the toilet room was a bit annoying The quality of breakfast could be improved Eg better quality of bacon fresh scrambled eggs instead of powder type   The location was convenient for exploring the old City The terrace was nice for views
We were well pleased with the hotel the staff were lovely especially the lady at breakfast nothing too much trouble Lovely central location Would certainly go back again
The concierge on the ground floor who is looking at you like if you were a rober just because we are young people The room was a bit cold  The bed was very confortable the 360 terrasse

don t have a proper bathroom no carpets no slippers provided a bit far from the center unless you like to walk a lot  The view facilities staff

The hotels location was really good only a short distance from ramblas and all the main attractions however the side road which you have to walk down to get to ramblas is extremely scary You feel unsafe the whole time we stayed there for 4 days and in the day time the street was fine but as soon as it was night time it was awful we seen 2 fights down that street and every night the street is full of prostitues who constantly follow any men down the street Even when I was walking with my partner they would follow us and grab his pockets to try and get into them If you are English and alone I would definitely avoid this street during dark   The bed was extremely comfortable the rooms were immaculate and the roof top bar is amazing The reception staff were very friendly and welcoming The man who served on the bar there also very friendly however he seemed to make up the prices as he went along every time we went to get the same round the prices were becoming higher and higher it wasn t until we questioned him on the prices that they dropped

Great location in eclectic district of the city it s an interesting circular hotel with great views 360 degree vistas a roof top bar which enjoys fantastic sunrise sunset photo opportunities

I thought it had a pool on the top floor but it was too small to swim in and so was more of a plunge pool Still a nice area to lounge around in with its fantastic 360 degree views   The location was excellent close to La Rambla and all the side streets off with all the great restaurants etc All the major sites were within walking distance or a short tube ride away The hotel itself was ultra modern and quite luxurious The bed was massive and extremely comfortable We were upgraded upon arrival to the eighth floor which meant we had fantastic views All in all good value for money

The location of the hotel isn t the best Only 5 mins walk to La Ramblas but there are prostitutes in the street nearby who you have to walk past at night We didn t feel immediately threatened but it was always nice to get into the hotel  Hotel was great Rooftop bar sensational and the staff very friendly and helpful

Air conditioning in hotel room was very loud especially when sleeping Room wasn t too clean on arrival Rooftop and pool open to public  Good location staff were helpful and rooftop was great for a drink

Only one English Channel is the news Good 30 minutes walk to the beach 10 mins to the ramblas Or 15 to the marina   Reception really lovely and helpful 360 bar staff lovely and friendly Beds and bedding so so comfy had raeally good sleeps Basic room big enough for me and my 10 year son

Didnt like the open plan bathroom   Excellent hotel a bit dissapointed with breakfast Choice Pool very small U wouldnt really consider it tobe a pool Hotel was clean and modern Liked the location and service

Our room was described as a triple however turned out to be a double with a fold out bed I complained and was offered another room but it was another double with fold out bed They said they don t have triples This was very cramped only 1 wardrobe between 3 people   Location was excellent and staff were very friendly but three people for a week in a room designed for 2 was very cramped

The first and second day during my stay my shower flooded and water ran into my room all over the place After calling in the team to get it fixed the problem was rectified however in almost any other hotel a room upgrade would have been offered that wasn t the case Location of the hotel is good however more located on the rougher side of the Ramblas Not very safe at night in some nearby streets prostitution and drug dealing is clearly visible My friend got mugged right outside the door of the hotel entrance phone stolen   Hotel design is nice Rooftop terrace has a great view and is fun during sundown Staff at reception is friendly and helpful Rooms are well designed though I wish there were more electric sockets for charging etc Room service is good Sauna in the basement is good
Asked thru booking com to check in early Booking com replied this would be ok for extra charge This was acceptable to me However when we arrived hotel had no knowledge of this   Staff v helpful
Very dark hotel difficult to see where u were going at times Not much space for storage bathrooms not that practical   Comfy bed good location as we could walk to other areas easily

Some of the staff where a little moody the room size was a little smaller And if you are sharing a room there is a mirror right near the shower so the other person can see you There was always some event on outside so was a little loud at times  Bed was so comfortable loved that you could choose the scent in your room And the Tonka bean icecream in the restaurant is to die for

Noise from street room was on first floor which is one up from ground floor Small room not adequate for 3 adults or families Towels and toilet tissue were not soft The pool is more like a large jacuzzi should not be advertised as a pool   Good location Beds very comfortable Female front desk staff very helpful especially Nita Gym was nice Beautiful view on top

There were issues concerning the cleanliness of the room details maybe but couldn t remain unnoticed If traveling with kids it s helpful to have in mind that the bathtub is inside the room   Breakfast although not of an extream variety was really tasty of a very good quality and containing local products Great view from the hotel terasse and from our room too Hotel staff was really helpful Bathroom amenities included everything one could need plus toothbrush and toothpaste kit and a comb

Would have been nicer to have a bigger pool but we knew what size it would be before booking so no complaint really  The 360 Bar on the roof is brilliant Great views and a great place to relax and have a few drinks whilst looking across superb views of the city The beds in the room were huge and extremely comfortable

There needs to be better plug points in the bedroom One of the beds had a plug next to it and the other didn t staying in a twin room The plug point under the TV was faulty and beyond that there weren t any other plugs in the room   The Bed was extremely comfy a gorgeous view from the rooftop and a lovely view from the bedroom Very lovely staff as well And the brunch food was delicious

The swimming pool is very tiny but there is a small jacuzzi at the end of it The deepest area in the swimming pool is 1meter and the tiny pool closes at 6pm It was still nice to use it to refresh yourself The view is so amazing that it was still OK to have a small pool We didn t mind but there is no privacy for the shower as it is in the room It might be an issue if you want some privacy while showering   The hotel is 5 min walk from last ramblas and metro stop liceo You can walk to the gothic quarter 15 20min Walk to el born quarter 30 35min walk to plaza de real 10mins and walk to Christophe Colombus 30mins The area where the hotel is located isn t the prettiest but there are many restaurants around I won t recommend a solo woman traveller to walk late at night We walked back around 12am and it was still lively We love the rooftop terrace bar at the top wines from 6euros sangria and some cocktails are at 10 euros The bed is so comfortable it was amazing We were upgraded for free to a deuce room on the 9th floor The view from the room was amazing The lightening in the room is cosy There is a large safe in the room and a Nespresso machine in some room The hotel has a great service to help their customers You can what s app them and ask them any requests We used it several times and the staff Julie and others was pretty amazing at booking restaurants for us via this app There is the possibility to book a late check out till 3pm for 22 euros Check out is at 12pm but many get it until 1pm for free Otherwise there are toilets and showers downstairs in the gym sauna to use and you can leave your bag in a secure way at the reception after you check out There is the bocqueria market 4 min walk it worth it to visit it The arume restaurant 2 min walk and the cera 23 restaurant 1 min walk are amazing book in advance

Nothing by far my favourite hotel I ve stayed at in Barcelona   The rooms were luxurious clean and modern The view is fantastic we were on the fifth floor And you couldn t get a better location We highly recommend this hotel and would definitely stay again
The superior tripple room was very small for three persons The pool on the roof a bit too small to be worth the name Expensive breakfast   Excellent view from the roof top bar Excellent breakfast
The pool on the rooftop needed to be heated and bigger   Bed was superb and it was a quirky room As it was my husbands birthday we received a free upgrade to a suite

Difficult to get taxis at time would of been a bonus if the hotel could of called one for us  Staff were excellent location was great loved the room bed was so comfty and loved the modern touch The rooftop pool had a spectacular view The restaurant food was outstanding breakfast and tapas we had was divine

Though in Las Ramblas at an end with small bars and restaurants surrounded by quiet dark streets Not much else to see within walking distance  staff was pleasant and accommodating room was clean bed very comfortable loved the panoramic view top of building Liked the quirky decor
Breakfast wasn t good very limited choice and not worth 15   Lovely modern hotel get location and amazing views from the 360 roof bar I would definitely return

A few elements of the bedroom needed attention fixing which did take away from the awesomeness of it all Pool water is freezing and there arent enough sun beds The whole hotel is wrapped in cage wire which some people may not like obscuring bedroom window  Super modern Comfy bed Free WiFi Decent hotel gym Friendly staff Optional 3pm late check out Rooftop vibe and fantastic views

Hotel is modern and well noise insulated from the outside and between rooms however local children were letting off fireworks adjacent to the hotel till midnight each of the 5 evenings So don t expect to drop off before 12am This was not a problem once we were expecting it   Friendly staff good location quality hotel and rooms with good food service Also 3 top class restaurants within 10 minute walk The rooftop lounge has a fantastic view of the City and the Mojitos are brilliant

Staff was meh At best Room was hot even with acon blasting Cleaners did poor job and my feet were always dirty Breakfast was horrible tasting and all cold Many items were empty and I was there at 8 30am Staff at bar 360 were not friendly to me although Daniel and Albert I think that was their names waited on pretty females first with a seeming good attitude and let the men stand there Oh yes they were often they were rude when they finally had to wait on us Female staff did even really try to pretend to be nice to anyone FYI not the best part of the city Lots of hookers   The roof top terrace had an excellent view of Barcelona

The bathroom was poorly designed My friend had to stay on the bed whilst I showered so she didn t see me because you could see the entire room from the shower due to the mirror The surrounding area wasn t very nice either as a young girl in a foreign country I didn t feel safe walking down the roads around the hotel so got taxis from right outside most of the time  The bed was extremely comfortable and the room was ultra modern with great lighting the 360 bar was great amazing views and drinks just a little expensive for the drinks The interactive map where you could book sight seeing things and the staff were extremely helpful when it came to location info

All round good hotel Only grumble would be that the shower area is not that private was not a problem for us but could be if you were travelling with a relative or something   The bed was very comfy and was a good location The 360 bar has amazing views and the drinks were not expensive as you would probably imagine them to be Rooms ultra modern clean and well maintained
There was not enough areas for storage drawers in the room or enough wardrobe hangers  Roof top bar high end d cor Staff were very friendly helpful and gave great recommendations

Rooftop bar was expensive but as you might expect with a spectacular view over the whole city and out to sea   Clean modern decor and the bed was very comfortable Staff friendly helpful and courteous Quiet room on upper floor and walking distance to explore most of the old city

The roof terrace is a little narrow and can easily become overcrowded The pool is a bit of a joke It would have been better to have used the space for more seating   Comfortable bed Good sized room Great location for exploring the old town Good view from the roof terrace
Nothing  Absolutely amazing place staff were so friendly Bed was huge 360 viewing roof balcony was superb Special thanks to Raphael simione and Joaqu n Cheers
Activating the lights was a nightmare Breakfast ws not a good deal Too expensive for what was provided  Staff at front desk were extremely helpful Room was spotless

There is too much of dullness in the place because of colours blacks and greys used The storage space is limited The idea of wash basin within the room does not gel with me In an effort to make the hotel look different it is more quirky   The location and the roof top bar
The roof terrace is something special   Good modern hotel with a great breakfast However the area is as rough as a badgers bum Not a great place at night

For a 4 star superior hotel I would expect a little bit more comfort in the hotel rooms Though they are very new and modern they are very small Privacy is not really given as the toilet door is acually a thin mirror wall which you can push to the side and back Furthermore probably it will be no problem for a couple but as I ve been traveling with a group of friends it was first a little bit unpleasant as the shower or the bathroom at all is not seperated from the rest of the room   The Hotel is located very near to the La Rambla Street so perfect for discovering the centre of Barcelona by a little walking tour The breakfast offers food vor every taste nationality and the free Prosecco gives you the final Feeling of being in vacations Above all the 360 overview on the roof top of the hotel was really amazing and higly recommendable
Noise from other guests in hotel corridors Some of the surrounding area was rundown   The bed was extremely comfy The roof top bar was excellent Staff very helpful
